vector for DokuWiki
===================

Compatible with DokuWiki

Lemming, Anteater, Rincewind, Angua, Adora Belle, Weatherwax, Binky, Ponder Stibbons, Hrun, Detritus, Elenor of Tsort, Frusterick Manners, Greebo, Hogfather

*   [Download](https://andreashaerter.com/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/latest)
    
*   [Report bugs](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/issues)
    
*   [Donate](https://donate.arsava.com/dokuwiki-template-vector/)
    

[![template](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/plugins/pluginrepo/images/dwplugin.png)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/templates)
 Wikipedia/MediaWiki look and feel for DokuWiki

[![](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/exe/fetch.php?w=220&tok=9f38db&media=https%3A%2F%2Ftrello.com%2F1%2Fcards%2F659eddb619f591051aec5523%2Fattachments%2F659eddf02a169266426f686f%2Fdownload%2Fvector-for-dokuwiki-template-screenshot.png)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/exe/fetch.php?tok=745876&media=https%3A%2F%2Ftrello.com%2F1%2Fcards%2F659eddb619f591051aec5523%2Fattachments%2F659eddf02a169266426f686f%2Fdownload%2Fvector-for-dokuwiki-template-screenshot.png "Screenshot of vector")

Last updated on

2014-02-09

Repository

[Source](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/)

Conflicts with

[wikiweko](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:wikiweko "template:wikiweko")

This extension has not been updated in over 2 years. It may no longer be maintained or supported and may have compatibility issues.

Tagged with [dokubook](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template?plugintag=dokubook#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [mediawiki](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template?plugintag=mediawiki#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [monobook](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template?plugintag=monobook#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [sidebar](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template?plugintag=sidebar#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [talk](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template?plugintag=talk#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [translation](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template?plugintag=translation#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [vector](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template?plugintag=vector#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [wikipedia](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template?plugintag=wikipedia#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")

**By [ARSAVA](mailto:dokuwiki%20%5Bat%5D%20dev%20%5Bdot%5D%20arsava%20%5Bdot%5D%20com "dokuwiki [at] dev [dot] arsava [dot] com")
**

*   [monobook](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:monobook "template:monobook")
    
*   [metaheaders](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:metaheaders "plugin:metaheaders")
    
*   [prsnl10](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:prsnl10 "template:prsnl10")
    
*   [mnml-blog](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:mnml-blog "template:mnml-blog")
    

![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) Problems with this template in **Ponder Stibbons**? Due to a [bug](https://github.com/dokuwiki/dokuwiki/issues/683 "https://github.com/dokuwiki/dokuwiki/issues/683")
 in DokuWiki, you need to **[disable the 'compress' option](https://www.dokuwiki.org/config:compress "config:compress")
!** ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg)

Edit

About
-----

“vector for DokuWiki” brings you the current[1)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fn__1)
 Wikipedia/[MediaWiki](http://www.mediawiki.org/ "http://www.mediawiki.org/")
 look and feel for [DokuWiki](https://www.dokuwiki.org/dokuwiki "dokuwiki")
.

*   Maintainer: [ARSAVA](https://dev.arsava.com/ "https://dev.arsava.com/")
     ([Andreas Haerter](https://andreashaerter.com/ "https://andreashaerter.com/")
    )
    
*   Contact: See “[Support](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#support "template:vector")
    ” and “[Contact](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#contact "template:vector")
    ”.
    

There are some things you'll find in this template that you won't find in most other DokuWiki templates, and are inspired by Wikipedia and MediaWiki. Some features:

*   **Discussions**  
    Configurable discussion pages _without_ requiring an additional plugin.
    
*   **User pages**  
    Users can have their own home page on your wiki.
    
*   **Cite this Article**  
    Allows students, journalists, researchers, and the like to easily reference articles on your site.
    
*   **Permanent Link**  
    _Guarantees_ that articles you link to are the same as you saw them that second you link them.
    
*   **Automatic plugin integration**  
    vector automatically detects and uses some popular, optionally installed plugins. Therefore you don't have to insert any code snippets or stuff when using: [translation](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:translation "plugin:translation")
    ,[2)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fn__2)
     [Open Office Export](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:odt "plugin:odt")
    , [dw2pdf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:dw2pdf "plugin:dw2pdf")
    , [html2pdf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:html2pdf "plugin:html2pdf")
    
*   All non-page portions (e.g. navigation) of the template can be edited just as if they were pages. How cool is that? ![8-)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/cool.svg)
    

Edit

Download
--------

![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) If you like the template, you might want to [donate](https://donate.arsava.com/dokuwiki-template-vector/ "https://donate.arsava.com/dokuwiki-template-vector/")
 a few bucks, or get some cool [QR Code generator](http://goqr.me/ "http://goqr.me/")
 merchandise. It is a lot of work. Thank you! ![:-)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/smile.svg)

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Version | `2014-02-09` |
| Download | [2014-02-09\_vector.tar.gz](https://andreashaerter.com/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/latest "https://andreashaerter.com/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/latest") |

Edit

*   **Note for existing users**: Since `2014-02-09`, there is no separate update `.tar.gz` anymore. The current archive is used for both install and update now. Instead of providing a separate update archive without the `/user` sub-directory, all example files in `/user` are delivered with the `.dist` extensions now to make sure your files won't get overwritten. This should be easier an more DokuWiki-like than the previous approach.
    

##### Important release notes for 2014-02-09

*   ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) Fixed a major bug, the configuration option were un-savable on DokuWiki 2013-12-08 “Binky” (cf. [Issue 22](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/issues/22 "https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/issues/22")
    ).
    
*   Full support for DokuWiki 2013-12-08 “Binky”.
    
*   There is no separate update archive anymore.
    

##### Important release notes for 2013-11-17

*   Full support for DokuWiki rc2013-10-28 “Binky”.
    

#### Repository (for developers)

The source code of this template is available as [Git repository](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/tree/master "https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/tree/master")
.

#### Verify download (for geeks)

See `[CHECKSUMS.asc](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/CHECKSUMS.asc "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/CHECKSUMS.asc") ` for MD5, SHA-1 and SHA-256 checksums. The file is signed with the GnuPG/PGP key (`[0x423B2839](https://andreashaerter.com/contact/gpg-public-key "https://andreashaerter.com/contact/gpg-public-key") `). You can use `gpg --verify ./CHECKSUMS.asc` to check/validate it.

Edit

Installation
------------

1.  Refer to [template](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template "template")
     on how to install and use templates in DokuWiki. For updating, see [below](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#update "template:vector")
    .
    
2.  Configure the place-holders. Have a look at “[What are these "Please fill or disable this placeholder (\[pagename\])" everywhere?](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#what_are_these_please_fill_or_disable_this_placeholder_pagename_everywhere "template:vector")
    ” to get help.
    

Edit

Support
-------

If you need help:

*   Check the [FAQ](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#faq "template:vector")
    .
    
*   Check the [README](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector#readme "https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector#readme")
    .
    
*   Use [http://search.dokuwiki.org](http://search.dokuwiki.org/ "http://search.dokuwiki.org")
     to find useful information.
    

If you found nothing helpful, ask your question at the [DokuWiki forum](http://forum.dokuwiki.org/ "http://forum.dokuwiki.org/")
 (preferred) or [IRC channel](https://www.dokuwiki.org/irc "irc")
.

Edit

Contact
-------

If you think you have found a bug or have a useful idea (a.k.a. “feature request”), [create an issue](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/issues "https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/issues")
 on GitHub (preferred), or contact us by [mail](mailto:dokuwiki%20%5Bat%5D%20dev%20%5Bdot%5D%20arsava%20%5Bdot%5D%20com "dokuwiki [at] dev [dot] arsava [dot] com")
.

Feel free to submit patches as GitHub pull requests (preferred) or by mail as well. However, please try to respect the [DokuWiki coding style](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:coding_style "devel:coding_style")
 as this template follows its rules.

Edit

Update
------

What to do to update your installed vector template?

1.  First of all: Backup your data, especially `/lib/tpl/vector`. But don't be scared. It is not rocket science.
    
2.  Download the current version [from above](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#download "template:vector")
    .
    
3.  Simply uncompress and copy it over your current `/lib/tpl/vector`. This works without problems when you follow the rules described in the [README](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector#readme "https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector#readme")
     (⇒ the place for \*all\* user-defined, custom stuff is `/lib/tpl/vector/user`!) because previously existing files in `/lib/tpl/vector/user` will not be touched or overwritten.[3)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fn__3)
    
4.  Recommended: Also update the plugins [Translation](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:translation "plugin:translation")
    , [Open Office Export](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:odt "plugin:odt")
    , [dw2pdf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:dw2pdf "plugin:dw2pdf")
     and [html2pdf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:html2pdf "plugin:html2pdf")
     if you are using one ore more of them. ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) This is especially important regarding Translation (some older versions may cause problems and/or results are looking badly).
    
5.  Have fun and think about a small [donation](https://donate.arsava.com/dokuwiki-template-vector/ "https://donate.arsava.com/dokuwiki-template-vector/")
     ![:-)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/smile.svg).
    
6.  Here is a list of files that were removed in recent releases. They do no harm, but you should delete them to keep your installation clean and tidy:  
    
    #removed in 2014-02-09
    /static/img/button-qrcode.png
    /user/button-css.png
    /user/button-xhtml.png
    /bug49642.php
    /README-de
    
    #removed in 2011-11-29
    /static/3rd/dokuwiki/\_mediamanager.css
    /static/3rd/dokuwiki/basic.css
    /static/3rd/dokuwiki/content.css
    /static/3rd/dokuwiki/design.css
    /static/3rd/dokuwiki/includes.css
    /static/3rd/dokuwiki/structure.css
    /inc\_mediamanager.php
    
    #removed in 2011-03-17
    /static/3rd/dokuwiki/\_linkwiz.css
    /static/3rd/dokuwiki/layout.css
    /static/3rd/dokuwiki/media.css
    

Edit

FAQ
---

Edit

### What are these "Please fill or disable this placeholder (\[pagename\])" everywhere?

The template optionally imports normal wiki pages and shows their content as

*   navigation
    
*   toolbox
    
*   global, sitewide notice
    
*   copyright note (off by default, default is the common copyright note by DokuWiki)
    

This means you can create the page mentioned in the “Please fill or disable this placeholder” message (e.g. “:wiki:navigation”) and its content will be shown instead of the message. All of these placeholders are configurable. Have a look at the DokuWiki admin section:

*   Show site wide notice?
    
*   If yes, use following wiki page for the site wide notice:  
    \[…\]
    
*   Show navigation?
    
*   If yes, use following wiki page as navigation:  
    \[…\]
    
*   Show copyright notice?
    
*   If yes, use default copyright notice?
    
*   If not default, use following wiki page as copyright notice:  
    \[…\]
    
*   Show toolbox?
    
*   If yes, use default toolbox?
    
*   If not default, use following wiki page as toolbox location:
    

Edit

### How can I check which version is currently installed?

Simply have a look at `/lib/tpl/vector/VERSION`. This is a textfile containing the version you are using (e.g. `2010-06-12`).

Edit

### How can I create a custom toolbox or exportbox? How can I change the built-in boxes order?

![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) First of all, remember: make changes to `/vector/**user**/boxes.php` ONLY. Do NOT edit `/vector/**conf**/boxes.php` to prevent trouble on updates.[4)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fn__4)

If you are not happy

*   with the default toolbox (or exportbox) and importing a normal wiki page is not flexible enough
    
*   and/or the order the built-in boxes are rendered
    

simply

1.  disable them via config
    
2.  copy the PHP code of the original boxes from `/vector/**conf**/boxes.php` into `/vector/**user**/boxes.php` and do all your customization there.
    

To do so, go to the DokuWiki admin section and have a look at the following options to disable the boxes you do not like:

*   Show navigation?  
    \[…\]
    
*   Show 'print/export' box?  
    \[…\]
    
*   Show toolbox?
    

Now copy the code of the box you want to customize from `/vector/**conf**/boxes.php` into `/vector/**user**/boxes.php` and start editing them as you like. Useful coding hints:

*   ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) You may want to remove the checks which disable some boxes. Especially watch out for:
    
    *   `if (tpl_getConf(“vector_exportbox”)){`
        
    *   `if (tpl_getConf(“vector_toolbox”)){`.
        
*   The DokuWiki function `[getID()](https://codesearch.dokuwiki.org/search?project=dokuwiki&defs=getID&path= "view definition for getID()") ` returns the _uncleaned_ ID of the current wiki page, including namespace.
    
*   The DokuWiki function `[getNS()](https://codesearch.dokuwiki.org/search?project=dokuwiki&defs=getNS&path= "view definition for getNS()") ` returns the namespace-part of an absolute wiki page ID. To get the cleaned namespace of the current wiki page, you may use:
    
    echo getNS(cleanID(getID()));
    
*   The DokuWiki function `[cleanID()](https://codesearch.dokuwiki.org/search?project=dokuwiki&defs=cleanID&path= "unknown definition") ` cleans up wiki page IDs, making them ready for usage with `[wl()](https://codesearch.dokuwiki.org/search?project=dokuwiki&defs=wl&path= "unknown definition") ` and `[auth_quickaclcheck()](https://codesearch.dokuwiki.org/search?project=dokuwiki&defs=auth_quickaclcheck&path= "unknown definition") `.
    
*   `[wl()](https://codesearch.dokuwiki.org/search?project=dokuwiki&defs=wl&path= "unknown definition") ` returns you the relative or absolute URL of a wiki page. Example: get the URL of the current wiki page:
    
    //relative URL
    echo wl(cleanID(getID()));
     
    //absolute URL
    echo wl(cleanID(getID()), "", true);
    
*   vector stores the username of the currently logged in user into the `$loginname` variable. You can use it to check if a user is logged in:
    
    if ($loginname \=== ""){
        //client is not a logged in user
        $\_vector\_boxes\["example-not-logged-in"\]\["headline"\] \= "Box: not logged in"
        $\_vector\_boxes\["example-not-logged-in"\]\["xhtml"\]    \=  "      <ul>\\n"
                                                              ."        <li id=\\"t-login\\"\><a href=\\"".wl(cleanID(getId()), [array](http://www.php.net/array)
    ("do" \=> "login"))."\\" rel=\\"nofollow\\"\>".hsc($lang\["btn\_login"\])."</a></li>\\n" //language comes from DokuWiki core
                                                              ."      </ul>";
    }else{
        //client is an authenticated user
        $\_vector\_boxes\["example-logged-in"\]\["headline"\] \= "Box: Hi ".hsc($loginname)."!";
        $\_vector\_boxes\["example-logged-in"\]\["xhtml"\]    \=  "      <ul>\\n"
                                                          ."        <li id=\\"t-upload\\"\><a href=\\"".DOKU\_BASE."lib/exe/mediamanager.php?ns=".getNS(getID())."\\" rel=\\"nofollow\\"\>".hsc($lang\["vector\_toolbxdef\_upload"\])."</a></li>\\n"
                                                          ."      </ul>";
    }
    

Edit

### How to change the logo/favicon/tabs/boxes\[...\]?

See [customizing](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#customizing "template:vector")
.

#### How to remove footer buttons completely?

Insert following to `/vector/**user**/buttons.php`

//delete all (defaults)
$\_vector\_btns \= [array](http://www.php.net/array)
();

Edit

### How can I hide the edit tab and boxes until users are logged in?

Go to the DokuWiki admin section and have a look at the following option (introduced in vector version `2010-06-27`):

*   Closed wiki (most links/tabs/boxes are hidden until user is logged in)?
    

Edit

### Is the template compatible to the Discussion plugin?

Short answer: yes.

The template brings support for basic discussion pages without the need to install any additional plugin. However, if you are interested to use the [Discussion plugin](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:discussion "plugin:discussion")
 (which allows threaded replies, avatars, captcha and other controls at the bottom of the wikipage instead of a separated basic discussionpage), simply install it and deactivate the template option “Use discussion tabs/sites?” at the DokuWiki admin section.

Edit

### The insitu JS footnotes are displayed at the wrong position. Why don't you fix this?

Even if the footnotes may work as expected in some other templates, the wrong insitu footnote popup position is not a template but a DokuWiki 2010-11-07 “Anteater” issue (see Bug [2114](http://bugs.dokuwiki.org/index.php?do=details&task_id=2114 "http://bugs.dokuwiki.org/index.php?do=details&task_id=2114")
). All templates with relative positioning are affected. This bug is fixed since DokuWiki 2011-04-22 “Rincewind RC1”. If you update your DokuWiki installation, the problem should be gone.

Edit

### Browser compatibility

The template should be compatible with all modern browsers:

*   Firefox ≥ 3
    
*   Opera ≥ 10
    
*   Safari ≥ 4, Chrome ≥ 1 and other newer Webkit based browsers.
    
*   MS Internet Explorer ≥ 7
    

Please note:

*   MS Internet Explorer 6 is also supported in general, there are only some cosmetic issues at the admin menu. These issues do _not_ affect normal wiki pages. The new Media Manager (introduced with DokuWiki 2011-11-10 “Angua RC1”) does not work with IE6.
    
*   I can't test _every_ browser (version) out there. Therefore it does not mean the template does not work if your browser is not listed above. Just try it out if you want to be sure.
    

Edit

Customizing
-----------

Have a look at the [README](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector#readme "https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector#readme")
. Everything regarding

*   own logo
    
*   own favicon
    
*   own CSS
    
*   own JavaScript
    
*   own CSS, language specific
    
*   own [Apple Touch Icon](http://developer.apple.com/library/IOs/documentation/AppleApplications/Reference/SafariWebContent/ConfiguringWebApplications/ConfiguringWebApplications.html "http://developer.apple.com/library/IOs/documentation/AppleApplications/Reference/SafariWebContent/ConfiguringWebApplications/ConfiguringWebApplications.html")
     (`apple-touch-icon.png`)
    
*   **own tabs**
    
*   **own buttons/icons** (footer)
    
*   **own boxes** (left-column)
    

is described there.

For the ones who are never reading READMEs:

*   ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) The place for **all** user-defined, custom stuff is “vector/user”. Reason: this folder will not be touched on updates.
    
*   ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) If you want to replace the default logo showed in the upper left, simply create a `/vector/user/logo.[png|gif|jpg]`. The template recognizes the file automatically and will use it instead of the default logo.
    
*   ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) If you want to add own tabs, have a look at `/vector/**user**/tabs.php` (**NOT** `/vector/**conf**/tabs.php`).
    
*   ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) If you want to add own buttons (footer), have a look at `/vector/**user**/buttons.php` (**NOT** `/vector/**conf**/buttons.php`).
    
*   ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) If you want to add own boxes (left-column), have a look at `/vector/**user**/boxes.php` (**NOT** `/vector/**conf**/boxes.php`).
    

Edit

### Custom tab examples

…to insert into `/vector/**user**/tabs.php` (**NOT** `/vector/**conf**/tabs.php`).[5)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fn__5)

**Hint:** Replace `$_vector_tabs_right` with `$_vector_tabs_left` to add the tabs to the left instead the right tab navigation (and vice versa).

#### Recent Changes

//recent changes
if (![empty](http://www.php.net/empty)
($conf\["recent\_days"\])){
    $\_vector\_tabs\_right\["ca-recent"\]\["text"\]     \= $lang\["btn\_recent"\]; //language comes from DokuWiki core
    $\_vector\_tabs\_right\["ca-recent"\]\["href"\]     \= wl("", [array](http://www.php.net/array)
("do" \=> "recent"), false, "&");
    $\_vector\_tabs\_right\["ca-recent"\]\["nofollow"\] \= true;
}

#### (un)subscribe namespace tab

//(un)subscribe namespace tab
if (![empty](http://www.php.net/empty)
($conf\["useacl"\]) &&
    ![empty](http://www.php.net/empty)
($conf\["subscribers"\]) &&
    ![empty](http://www.php.net/empty)
($loginname)){ //$loginname was defined within main.php
    if ([empty](http://www.php.net/empty)
($INFO\["subscribedns"\])){ //$INFO comes from DokuWiki core
        $\_vector\_tabs\_right\["ca-watchns"\]\["href"\] \= wl(cleanID(getID()), [array](http://www.php.net/array)
("do" \=> "subscribens"), false, "&");
        $\_vector\_tabs\_right\["ca-watchns"\]\["text"\] \= $lang\["vector\_subscribens"\]; 
    }else{
        $\_vector\_tabs\_right\["ca-watchns"\]\["href"\] \= wl(cleanID(getID()), [array](http://www.php.net/array)
("do" \=> "unsubscribens"), false, "&");
        $\_vector\_tabs\_right\["ca-watchns"\]\["text"\] \= $lang\["vector\_unsubscribens"\]; 
    }
}

#### Add custom plugin tab

The vector template doesn't handle [MENU\_ITEMS\_ASSEMBLY](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:event:menu_items_assembly "devel:event:menu_items_assembly")
 event, so plugins that relies on this event to add buttons to [menus](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:menus "devel:menus")
 (like [deletepagebutton](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:deletepagebutton "plugin:deletepagebutton")
 and [bookcreator](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:bookcreator "plugin:bookcreator")
 plugins) doesn't show up it's icon/link (button). But you can foreach each PageMenu item and add it's icon/link manually.

//custom plugin tab
$skip\_types \= \['backlink', 'create', 'edit', 'export\_odt', 'export\_pdf', 'revs', 'show', 'top'\];
foreach((new \\dokuwiki\\Menu\\PageMenu())\->getItems() as $item) {
    if([in\_array](http://www.php.net/in_array)
($item\->[getType](http://www.php.net/gettype)
(), $skip\_types)) {
        continue;
    }
 
    $attr \= $item\->getLinkAttributes();
    $\_vector\_tabs\_right\["tab-" . $item\->[getType](http://www.php.net/gettype)\
()\]\["text"\]     \= $attr\['title'\];
    $\_vector\_tabs\_right\["tab-" . $item\->[getType](http://www.php.net/gettype)\
()\]\["href"\]     \= $attr\['href'\];
    $\_vector\_tabs\_right\["tab-" . $item\->[getType](http://www.php.net/gettype)\
()\]\["class"\]    \= $attr\['class'\];
    if ($item\->isNofollow()) {
        $\_vector\_tabs\_right\["tab-" . $item\->[getType](http://www.php.net/gettype)\
()\]\["nofollow"\] \= true;
    }
 
}

Edit

### Custom box examples

…to insert into `/vector/**user**/boxes.php` (**NOT** `/vector/**conf**/boxes.php`).[6)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fn__6)

#### (un)subscribe page and NS in box

I altered things a bit for those that want the (un)subscribe tab in a button (limited space in the upper navigation)

//ATTENTION: "ca-watch" is used as css id selector!
if (![empty](http://www.php.net/empty)
($conf\["useacl"\]) &&
    ![empty](http://www.php.net/empty)
($conf\["subscribers"\]) &&
    ![empty](http://www.php.net/empty)
($loginname)){ //$loginname was defined within main.php
	$\_vector\_boxes\["ca-watch"\]\["headline"\] 	\= $lang\["vector\_subscribtions"\];
    if ([empty](http://www.php.net/empty)
($INFO\["subscribed"\])){ //$INFO comes from DokuWiki core
		$\_vector\_boxes\["ca-watch"\]\["xhtml"\]		.="<ul>\\n"
								."	<li id=\\"t-subpage\\"\><a href=\\"".wl(cleanID(getID()), [array](http://www.php.net/array)
("do" \=> "subscribe"), false, "&")."\\" rel=\\"nofollow\\"\>".hsc($lang\["btn\_subscribe"\])."</a></li>\\n"
								."	</ul>";
    }else{
		$\_vector\_boxes\["ca-watch"\]\["xhtml"\]		.="<ul>\\n"
								."	<li id=\\"t-subpage\\"\><a href=\\"".wl(cleanID(getID()), [array](http://www.php.net/array)
("do" \=> "unsubscribe"), false, "&")."\\" rel=\\"nofollow\\"\>".hsc($lang\["btn\_unsubscribe"\])."</a></li>\\n"
								."	</ul>";
    }
	if ([empty](http://www.php.net/empty)
($INFO\["subscribedns"\])){ //$INFO comes from DokuWiki core
		$\_vector\_boxes\["ca-watch"\]\["xhtml"\]		.="<ul>\\n"
								."	<li id=\\"t-subns\\"\><a href=\\"".wl(cleanID(getID()), [array](http://www.php.net/array)
("do" \=> "subscribens"), false, "&")."\\" rel=\\"nofollow\\"\>".hsc($lang\["vector\_subscribens"\])."</a></li>\\n"
								."	</ul>";
	}else{
		$\_vector\_boxes\["ca-watch"\]\["xhtml"\]		.="<ul>\\n"
								."	<li id=\\"t-subns\\"\><a href=\\"".wl(cleanID(getID()), [array](http://www.php.net/array)
("do" \=> "unsubscribens"), false, "&")."\\" rel=\\"nofollow\\"\>".hsc($lang\["vector\_unsubscribens"\])."</a></li>\\n"
								."	</ul>";
	}
}

Note that I added $lang\[“vector\_subscribtions”\] to the lang.php file (the title of the box), feel free to enter a name there (Inschrijvingen, Subcribtions, or something)

In my case I added the following to <wiki>\\lang\\nl\\lang.php

$lang\["vector\_subscribtions"\] \= "Inschrijven";

If nothing is entered there, no title is shown (only the line).

If you want to remove the (un)subscribe tabs from the upper navigation, I suggest commenting them in the conf/tabs.php or the user/tabs.php, don't remove things you might need later on ![;-)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/wink.svg)

Grtz, Theo

#### Add custom plugin toolbox

The vector template doesn't handle [MENU\_ITEMS\_ASSEMBLY](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:event:menu_items_assembly "devel:event:menu_items_assembly")
 event, so plugins that relies on this event to add buttons to [menus](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:menus "devel:menus")
 (like [deletepagebutton](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:deletepagebutton "plugin:deletepagebutton")
 and [bookcreator](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:bookcreator "plugin:bookcreator")
 plugins) doesn't show up it's icon/link (button). But you can foreach each PageMenu item and add it's icon/link manually. See [Issue #64](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/issues/64 "https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/issues/64")
 on GitHub (arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector).

Edit

### Hacks for /user/screen.css

…to insert into `/vector/**user**/screen.css` (**NOT** `/vector/**static**/css/screen.css`).[7)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fn__7)

#### Wider sidebar / more space for left column

/\* Give sidebar more space. Default: 10em. \*/
div#content,
div#head-base,
div#footer {
    margin-left: 12em;
}
div#panel,
div#p-logo,
div#p-logo a {
    width: 12em;
}
#left-navigation {
    left: 12em;
}

Simply replace the `12em` with a value you like. Default value is `10em`.

#### Navigation: list indent

div#p-navigation li.level1 ul {
  margin-top: 0.5em !important;
  margin-left: 1em !important;
}

#### Trace: font, spacing, border color

Smaller font, space out breadcrumbs, dimmer text, lighter border

.catlinks {
        font-size: 75%;
        border: 1px solid #ddd;
}
.bchead, a.breadcrumbs {
        opacity: 0.6;
}
a.breadcrumbs {
        margin: 0 2px;
}
a.breadcrumbs:hover {
        opacity: 1;
}

#### Table of Contents (TOC): indent if position = 'sidebar'

/\* Indent table of contents (TOC) (if position: sidebar)
   Note: Config option "Table of contents (TOC) position" (vector\_toc\_position)
         has to be set to "sidebar". Otherwise, this does not have any effect) \*/
div#panel #p-toc .dokuwiki li.level2 {
  margin-top: 0.5em;
  margin-left: 4px;
}
div#panel #p-toc .dokuwiki li.level3 {
  margin-top: 0.5em;
  margin-left: 7px;
}
div#panel #p-toc .dokuwiki li.level4,
div#panel #p-toc .dokuwiki li.level5,
div#panel #p-toc .dokuwiki li.level6 {
  margin-top: 0.5em;
  margin-left: 10px;
}

If you need more/less indentation, adjust the `margin-left` values to you needs.

#### Table of Contents (TOC): font, spacing, corners, shadows

Larger font, lighter color for TOC header text, slight gradient for TOC header, more space after bullets, rounded corners + shadows.

div.dokuwiki div.toc {
        font-size: 90%;
}
div.dokuwiki .toc a {
        padding-left: 0.3em;
}
div.dokuwiki div.tocheader {
        padding-left: 1em;
        color: #333;
}
.tocheader {
        border-top-left-radius: 8px;
        border-top-right-radius: 8px;
        -moz-border-radius-topleft: 8px;
        -moz-border-radius-topright: 8px;
        box-shadow: 4px 4px 10px #aaa;
        -moz-box-shadow: 4px 4px 10px #aaa;
        background: -webkit-linear-gradient(left, #eaf2f8, #dee7ec);
        background: -moz-linear-gradient(left, #eaf2f8, #dee7ec);
        background: -ms-linear-gradient(left, #eaf2f8, #dee7ec);
}
#toc\_\_inside {
        border-bottom-left-radius: 8px;
        border-bottom-right-radius: 8px;
        -moz-border-radius-bottomleft: 8px;
        -moz-border-radius-bottomright: 8px;
        box-shadow: 4px 4px 10px #aaa;
        -moz-box-shadow: 4px 4px 10px #aaa;
}

#### Footer: centered

/\* centered footer (instead of left aligned) \*/
#footer #footer-info li,
#footer #footer-info .dokuwiki,
#footer #footer-info .license,
#footer #footer-places li,
#footer #footer-places .dokuwiki {
  text-align: center !important;
}
#footer #footer-places li {
  float: none !important;
}

#### Footer buttons (default template style): on hover highlighting

I prefer the default template way that the footer buttons highlight when you put you mouse on them (or rather, how they are faded when you do not have your mouse on them), like they do at the bottom of this page, so I added this to `/vector/**user**/screen.css`:

/\* highlight footer buttons on hover \*/
#footer #footer-places a img {
  opacity: 0.5;
  border: 0;
}
#footer #footer-places a:hover img {
  opacity: 1;
}

#### Highlight Current Section

highlight current section (# in URL)

:target { background-color: lightblue; }

#### InterWiki link icons on the left side

Most other templates are displaying [InterWiki](https://www.dokuwiki.org/interwiki "interwiki")
 icons on the left side of links (vector does this on the right side by default). CSS to change the behaviour (left instead of right side):

div.dokuwiki a.interwiki {
  background-position: center left;
  padding: 0 0 0 17px;
}

Thanks to [Lenny](https://forum.dokuwiki.org/u/lenehey "https://forum.dokuwiki.org/u/lenehey")
 for this!

#### Mail, external URL and samba share link icons on the left side

div#bodyContent a.mail,
div#bodyContent a.urlextern {
  background-position: center left;
  padding: 0 0 0 13px;
}
div.dokuwiki a.windows {
  background-position: center left;
  padding: 0 0 1px 18px;
}

#### Limit width of Ajax Quick Search results

#qsearch\_\_out,
#qsearch\_\_out ul {
  width: 17em;
  \*width: 16em; /\* do not remove the star in front, attribute hack for MS IE6/7 \*/
}

#### Add border to upload button of media manager

div.qq-upload-button {
 border: 1px solid \_\_border\_\_;
}

#### Automatically numbering Headings and Table of Contents (TOC) via CSS

/\* Automatically numbering Headings via CSS 
https://philarcher.org/diary/2013/headingnumbers/ \*/
body {counter-reset: h2}
h2 {counter-reset: h3}
h3 {counter-reset: h4}
h4 {counter-reset: h5}
h5 {counter-reset: h6}
 
h2:before {counter-increment: h2; content: counter(h2) ". "}
h3:before {counter-increment: h3; content: counter(h2) "." counter(h3) ". "}
h4:before {counter-increment: h4; content: counter(h2) "." counter(h3) "." counter(h4) ". "}
h5:before {counter-increment: h5; content: counter(h2) "." counter(h3) "." counter(h4) "." counter(h5) ". "}
h6:before {counter-increment: h6; content: counter(h2) "." counter(h3) "." counter(h4) "." counter(h5) "." counter(h6) ". "}
 
h2.nocount:before, h3.nocount:before, h4.nocount:before, h5.nocount:before, h6.nocount:before, #dw\_\_toc h3:before, #panel h5:before { content: ""; counter-increment: none }
 
/\* Automatically numbering Table of Contents (TOC) via CSS
https://www.freecodecamp.org/news/numbering-with-css-counters/ \*/
#dw\_\_toc ul ul {
  list-style-type: none;
  counter-reset: css-counters 0; /\* intializes counter, set -1 for zero-based counters \*/
}
 
#dw\_\_toc ul ul li div.li:before {
  counter-increment: css-counters;
  content: counters(css-counters, ".") " "; /\* generates inherited counters from parents \*/
}

#### Images exceed page body width

By default, images are not scaled to the width of the page body and exceed the visible region of the page, so I added this to `/vector/**user**/screen.css`:

div#bodyContent.dokuwiki img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; object-fit: cover; }
div#bodyContent.dokuwiki svg { max-width: 50%; height: auto !important; object-fit: cover; }

Edit

Version history
---------------

Older releases are no longer recommended for usage and are listed for reference only.

| vector version | Download | Designed for and tested on DokuWiki | Release notes and comments |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `2014-02-09` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2014-02-09_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2014-02-09_vector.tar.gz")<br>  <br>No update archive anymore, the new `tar.gz` is used for both install and update. | 2013-12-08 “Binky”,  <br>2012-10-13 “Adora Belle” | ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) Fixed bug, un-savable configuration on 2013-12-08 “Binky”; Full support for DokuWiki 2013-12-08 “Binky”; Add Hebrew language file; Update support and contact information. |
| `2013-11-17` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2013-11-17_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2013-11-17_vector.tar.gz")<br>  <br>[Update](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2013-11-17_vector-update.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2013-11-17_vector-update.tar.gz") | rc2013-10-28 “Binky”,  <br>2012-10-13 “Adora Belle” | Full support for DokuWiki rc2013-10-28 “Binky”; Add Korean language files; Update support and contact information. |
| `2013-02-19` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2013-02-19_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2013-02-19_vector.tar.gz")<br>  <br>[Update](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2013-02-19_vector-update.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2013-02-19_vector-update.tar.gz") | 2012-10-13 “Adora Belle”,  <br>2012-01-25b “Angua” | Small print styles improvement; Update support and contact information. |
| `2012-10-17` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2012-10-17_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2012-10-17_vector.tar.gz")<br>  <br>[Update](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2012-10-17_vector-update.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2012-10-17_vector-update.tar.gz") | 2012-10-13 “Adora Belle”,  <br>2012-01-25b “Angua” | Small improvements: better SSL/HTTPS handling for the QR Code feature; Catalan language update. |
| `2012-10-14` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2012-10-14_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2012-10-14_vector.tar.gz")<br>  <br>[Update](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2012-10-14_vector-update.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2012-10-14_vector-update.tar.gz") | 2012-10-13 “Adora Belle”,  <br>2012-01-25b “Angua” | Full support for DokuWiki 2012-10-13 “Adora Belle”; ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) New option: `vector_qrcodebox` (controls if a box with a QR Code of current wiki page URL will be shown in the sidebar); Multilingual side-wide and copyright notices for [Translation plugin](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin%3Atranslation "https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin%3Atranslation")<br> users (cf. [commit message](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/commit/4d8721d7b397e86dd3378afad3de7f8c84ae19d5 "https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/commit/4d8721d7b397e86dd3378afad3de7f8c84ae19d5")<br>); Added Slovak and Persion language, French language update. |
| `2011-12-10` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-12-10_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-12-10_vector.tar.gz")<br>  <br>[Update](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-12-10_vector-update.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-12-10_vector-update.tar.gz") | rc2011-11-10 “Angua RC1”,  <br>2011-05-25a “Rincewind” | ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) This version introduces a multilingual navigation for [Translation plugin](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin%3Atranslation "https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin%3Atranslation")<br> users. **Users of the existing translation box snippet should edit some source code** in `/vector/user/boxes.php`: just replace the [old](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/blob/8442308b8db458efaf90b460ab2d7b7397c098bc/user/boxes.php#L35 "https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/blob/8442308b8db458efaf90b460ab2d7b7397c098bc/user/boxes.php#L35")<br> with the [new](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/blob/952c7991cf1d4b2d3dff2ac63cab79d5923baf66/user/boxes.php#L35 "https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/blob/952c7991cf1d4b2d3dff2ac63cab79d5923baf66/user/boxes.php#L35")<br> lines.  <br>Added fix for [wrong](http://forum.dokuwiki.org/thread/7743 "http://forum.dokuwiki.org/thread/7743")<br> horizontal rule clearing (`----` / `<hr>`\-Tag); Catalan language update. |
| `2011-11-29` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-11-29_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-11-29_vector.tar.gz")<br>  <br>[Update](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-11-29_vector-update.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-11-29_vector-update.tar.gz") | rc2011-11-10 “Angua RC1”,  <br>2011-05-25a “Rincewind” | ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) Full support for DokuWiki's new Media Manager; ![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) Multilingual navigation for [Translation plugin](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin%3Atranslation "https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin%3Atranslation")<br> users (**NOTE:** Users of the existing translation box snippet should edit some source code in `/vector/user/boxes.php`: just replace the [old](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/blob/8442308b8db458efaf90b460ab2d7b7397c098bc/user/boxes.php#L35 "https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/blob/8442308b8db458efaf90b460ab2d7b7397c098bc/user/boxes.php#L35")<br> with the [new](https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/blob/952c7991cf1d4b2d3dff2ac63cab79d5923baf66/user/boxes.php#L35 "https://github.com/arsava/dokuwiki-template-vector/blob/952c7991cf1d4b2d3dff2ac63cab79d5923baf66/user/boxes.php#L35")<br> lines); Apple Touch Icon support (see README for details); added Russian, Spanish and Catalan language. |
| `2011-05-10` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-05-10_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-05-10_vector.tar.gz")<br>  <br>[Update](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-05-10_vector-update.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-05-10_vector-update.tar.gz") | rc2011-05-08 “Rincewind RC2”,  <br>2010-11-07 “Anteater”,  <br>2009-12-25 “Lemming” | Cross browser compatibility fixes. |
| `2011-05-04` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-05-04_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-05-04_vector.tar.gz")<br>  <br>[Update](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-05-04_vector-update.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-05-04_vector-update.tar.gz") | rc2011-04-22 “Rincewind RC1”,  <br>2010-11-07 “Anteater”,  <br>2009-12-25 “Lemming” | Improved media manager, added Basque language, hide breadcrumbs in mediamanager. |
| `2011-03-17` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-03-17_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-03-17_vector.tar.gz")<br>  <br>[Update](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-03-17_vector-update.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2011-03-17_vector-update.tar.gz") | 2010-11-07 “Anteater”,  <br>2009-12-25 “Lemming” | Added French language, plugin compatibility improvements (CSS): bureaucracy and some others. Switched css base from 'default' template to 'starter' template (→ [reason](http://www.freelists.org/post/dokuwiki/Core-devs-I-need-some-info-to-keep-my-templates-maintainable "http://www.freelists.org/post/dokuwiki/Core-devs-I-need-some-info-to-keep-my-templates-maintainable")<br>). |
| `2010-08-17` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-08-17_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-08-17_vector.tar.gz")<br>  <br>[Update](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-08-17_vector-update.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-08-17_vector-update.tar.gz") | 2009-12-25 “Lemming” | Added Chinese (simplified) language files; Respect disabled 'search' and 'profile'; Added /user/tracker.php to make web analytics software integration easier; CSS: fixed list styles, TOC, some minor bugs; |
| `2010-06-29` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-06-29_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-06-29_vector.tar.gz")<br>  <br>[Update](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-06-29_vector-update.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-06-29_vector-update.tar.gz") | 2009-12-25 “Lemming” | Template respects $conf\['disableactions'\], improved mediamanager. |
| `2010-06-27` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-06-27_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-06-27_vector.tar.gz")<br>  <br>[Update](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-06-27_vector-update.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-06-27_vector-update.tar.gz") | 2009-12-25 “Lemming” | New config options (user pages optional, closed wiki - most tabs/boxes will be hidden until user is logged in if active); added Italian, Brazilian Portuguese and Dutch language; support for PNG favicon. |
| `2010-06-12` | [Release](https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-06-12_vector.tar.gz "https://andreashaerter.com/tmp/downloads/dokuwiki-template-vector/2010-06-12_vector.tar.gz") | 2009-12-25 “Lemming” | Initial release |

[1)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fnt__1)

Wikipedia used “[monobook](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:monobook "template:monobook")
” until the [mid of 2010](http://blog.wikimedia.org/2010/a-new-look-for-wikipedia/ "http://blog.wikimedia.org/2010/a-new-look-for-wikipedia/")
, now “vector” is in use.

[2)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fnt__2)

via custom box, see `/vector/user/boxes.php`

[3)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fnt__3)

except the example files with the `.dist` extension

[4)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fnt__4)
 , [5)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fnt__5)
 , [6)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fnt__6)
 , [7)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector#fnt__7)

cause files in `vector/user/` will be preserved on updates, so you don't have to do your customizations over and over again

# plugin:deletepagebutton [DokuWiki]

plugin:deletepagebutton

### Table of Contents

*   [Delete Page Button Plugin](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:deletepagebutton?do=#delete_page_button_plugin)
    
    *   [Installation](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:deletepagebutton?do=#installation)
        
    *   [Usage](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:deletepagebutton?do=#usage)
        
    *   [Configuration and Settings](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:deletepagebutton?do=#configuration_and_settings)
        
    *   [Development](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:deletepagebutton?do=#development)
        
    *   [FAQ](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:deletepagebutton?do=#faq)
        
    *   [Discussion](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:deletepagebutton?do=#discussion)
        

Delete Page Button Plugin
=========================

Compatible with DokuWiki

*   2025-05-14 "Librarian" **probably**
*   2024-02-06 "Kaos" **yes**
*   2023-04-04 "Jack Jackrum" **yes**
*   2022-07-31 "Igor" **yes**

*   [Download](https://github.com/dregad/dokuwiki-plugin-deletepagebutton/zipball/master)
    
*   [Report bugs](https://github.com/dregad/dokuwiki-plugin-deletepagebutton/issues)
    
*   [Donate](https://github.com/sponsors/dregad)
    

[![plugin](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/plugins/pluginrepo/images/dwplugin.png)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins)
 Adds a PageMenu button to Delete the current page

[![](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/exe/fetch.php?w=220&tok=bba8c6&media=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fdregad%2Fdokuwiki-plugin-deletepagebutton%2Fmaster%2Fimages%2Fscreenshot.png)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/exe/fetch.php?tok=4b3f8b&media=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fdregad%2Fdokuwiki-plugin-deletepagebutton%2Fmaster%2Fimages%2Fscreenshot.png "Screenshot of deletepagebutton")

Last updated on

2022-06-08

Provides

[Action](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins?plugintype=4#extension__table "List all Action plugins")

Repository

[Source](https://github.com/dregad/dokuwiki-plugin-deletepagebutton/)

Similar to [pagebuttons](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:pagebuttons "plugin:pagebuttons")

Tagged with [delete](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins?plugintag=delete#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [page](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins?plugintag=page#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")

**By [Damien Regad](mailto:dregad%20%5Bat%5D%20mantisbt%20%5Bdot%5D%20org "dregad [at] mantisbt [dot] org")
**

*   [newpagetemplate](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:newpagetemplate "plugin:newpagetemplate")
    
*   [cspheader](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:cspheader "plugin:cspheader")
    
*   [authwordpress](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:authwordpress "plugin:authwordpress")
    
*   [addnewpage](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:addnewpage "plugin:addnewpage")
    

Edit

Installation
------------

Install the plugin using the [Extension Manager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:extension "plugin:extension")
 and the download URL above, which points to latest version of the plugin. Refer to [Plugins](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins "plugins")
 on how to install plugins manually.

Edit

Usage
-----

On any page that the current user is allowed to edit, a _Delete_ button is displayed (trash can icon), allowing them to easily delete the page, without having to follow the cumbersome, officially [documented method](https://www.dokuwiki.org/page#delete_a_page "page")
.

[![](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/exe/fetch.php?w=350&cache=recache&tok=756c24&media=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fdregad%2Fdokuwiki-plugin-deletepagebutton%2Fmaster%2Fimages%2Fscreenshot.png)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/exe/fetch.php?cache=recache&tok=4b3f8b&media=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fdregad%2Fdokuwiki-plugin-deletepagebutton%2Fmaster%2Fimages%2Fscreenshot.png "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dregad/dokuwiki-plugin-deletepagebutton/master/images/screenshot.png")

If JavaScript is enabled and the current [Template](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template "template")
 is supported by the plugin, a confirmation dialog will be displayed prior to deleting the page.

[![](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/exe/fetch.php?w=300&cache=recache&tok=ede06a&media=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fdregad%2Fdokuwiki-plugin-deletepagebutton%2Fmaster%2Fimages%2Fconfirm.png)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/exe/fetch.php?cache=recache&tok=5a9303&media=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fdregad%2Fdokuwiki-plugin-deletepagebutton%2Fmaster%2Fimages%2Fconfirm.png "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dregad/dokuwiki-plugin-deletepagebutton/master/images/confirm.png")

Edit

Configuration and Settings
--------------------------

None

Edit

| [plugin:config \[2017-12-01 00:28\]](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config?rev=1512084505)<br> – 2600:1700:f21:5320:b163:44ef:a3fc:f26c |     | [plugin:config \[2024-09-28 23:18\]](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config)<br> (current) – old revision restored (2024-09-19 07:08) michaelsy |     |
| Line 1: |     | Line 1: |     |
| \-  | **GOTCHA!!**! | +   | **\====== Configuration Manager Plugin ======** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\---- plugin ----** |
|     |     | +   | **description: Manage your wiki's configuration settings (bundled with DokuWiki)** |
|     |     | +   | **author     : Christopher Smith** |
|     |     | +   | **email      : chris@jalakai.co.uk** |
|     |     | +   | **type       : admin** |
|     |     | +   | **lastupdate : 2014-03-18** |
|     |     | +   | **compatible : (bundled)** |
|     |     | +   | **screenshot\_img: :plugin:configmanager.png** |
|     |     | +   | **depends    :** |
|     |     | +   | **conflicts  :** |
|     |     | +   | **similar    :** |
|     |     | +   | **tags       : configuration, settings, options,** !**bundled** |
|     |     | +   | **\----** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\===== Description =====** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **{{ :plugin:configmanager.png?350\|The Configuration Manager - Field colors: blue = default, white = local change, light red = protected setting}}** |
|     |     | +   | **The Config Manager allows wiki \[\[config:superuser\|administrators\]\] to easily alter the wiki \[\[:config\|configuration\]\] settings online from the comfort of their favorite web browser. This plugin manages basic DokuWiki configurations as well as \[\[devel:configuration\|other settings\]\] for installed \[\[:plugins\]\] and currently used \[\[:template\]\].** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\===== Usage =====** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **The Config Manager is accessible from the admin screen (Login as superuser, click "Admin" and choose "{{https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dokuwiki/dokuwiki/master/lib/plugins/config/admin.svg?14}} Configuration Settings").** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **Settings are shown with different backgrounds to highlight their current status.** |
|     |     | +   | **\* A blue background is used to show default values (''conf/dokuwiki.php''), eg. values that have not been modified by the user.** |
|     |     | +   | **\* A white background indicates local changes (''conf/local.php'').** |
|     |     | +   | **\* A light red background shows protected settings (''conf/local.protected.php'') which can not be modified.** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **Modify settings to your needs and save it by using the ''Save'' button at bottom of the page, by pressing 'Enter' in a textbox or by using the \[\[:accesskey\]\] of your browser: ''<accesskey> + S''** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\==== How is your config saved ====** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **On saving changed settings this plugin will copy the current local settings file (''conf/local.php'') to ''conf/local.php.bak'' and save the updated settings to ''conf/local.php''.  It will never make any changes to the default settings stored in ''conf/dokuwiki.php''.  However, any settings found in ''conf/local.php'' will override the default settings as explained in the \[\[:config\|configuration options page\]\].** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **The plugin adds the following lines to the top of ''conf/local.php'' when it updates it:** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **<file php conf/local.php>** |
|     |     | +   | **/\*** |
|     |     | +   | **\* DokuWiki's Main Configuration File - Local Settings** |
|     |     | +   | **\* Auto-generated by config plugin** |
|     |     | +   | **\* Run for user: <username>** |
|     |     | +   | **\* Date: <current date/time, rfc 2822 format (day, dd MMM YYYY hh:mm:ss TZ)>** |
|     |     | +   | **\*/** |
|     |     | +   | **</file>** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\==== Protecting Settings ====** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **You can protect certain settings by placing them in ''conf/local.protected.php'' (create the file if it doesn't exist).** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **By default DokuWiki loads its configuration files in the following order:** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **- ''conf/dokuwiki.php''** |
|     |     | +   | **- ''conf/local.php''** |
|     |     | +   | **- ''conf/local.protected.php''** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **This way, it is ensured that any values previously set from ''conf/dokuwiki.php'' and ''conf/local.php'' will be overridden by protected values from ''conf/local.protected.php''. Any settings found in ''conf/local.protected.php'' will be displayed by the plugin surrounded in light-red to indicate their protected status. Editing of protected values is disabled.** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **The loading order of configuration files is controlled by the global ''\[\[devel:preload\|$config\_cascade\]\]'' variable.** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\=== Example ===** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **<code php conf/local.protected.php>** |
|     |     | +   | **<?php** |
|     |     | +   | **/\*\*** |
|     |     | +   | **\* Protected settings** |
|     |     | +   | **\* Do override DokuWiki default settings and local settings from Config Manager** |
|     |     | +   | **\*/** |
|     |     | +   | **$conf\['useacl'\] = 1;** |
|     |     | +   | **</code>** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\==== File Permissions ====** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **To be able to save the configuration data, the file permissions of ''conf/local.php'' needs to be writable by the webserver, as well as the configuration directory itself. Refer to \[\[install:permissions\]\] on details how set file permissions on various systems.** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **When the plugin detects that the config file can not be written, it will show a message box at the top of the page that says** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\> "The settings file can not be updated, if this is unintentional, ensure the local settings file name and permissions are correct."** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **When this happens, the save button won't be shown.** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\==== Triangle, Exclamation and Padlock Mark ====** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **Some fields in the configuration page show:** |
|     |     | +   | **\* A yellow warning sign ({{:config:warning.png?nolink\|}}) , or** |
|     |     | +   | **\* An exclamation mark in a red circle ({{:config:danger.png?nolink\|}}), or** |
|     |     | +   | **\* The drawing of a padlock ({{:config:security.png?nolink\|}})** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **These are the meanings of these three symbols:\\\\** |
|     |     | +   | **{{:config:warning.png?nolink\|}} \*\*Yellow Mark\*\* ⇒ changing this option may result in undesirable behaviors.\\\\** |
|     |     | +   | **{{:config:danger.png?nolink\|}} \*\*Red circle\*\* ⇒ changing this option could make your wiki and the configuration menu inaccessible.\\\\** |
|     |     | +   | **{{:config:security.png?nolink\|}} \*\*Padlock\*\* ⇒ changing this option could present a security risk.\\\\** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **Please, keep attention when you change these fields.** |

|     | \====== Configuration Manager Plugin ====== |     | \====== Configuration Manager Plugin ====== |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     | \---- plugin ---- |     | \---- plugin ---- |
|     | description: Manage your wiki's configuration settings (bundled with DokuWiki) |     | description: Manage your wiki's configuration settings (bundled with DokuWiki) |

|     |     |     |     |
|     | \===== Description ===== |     | \===== Description ===== |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     | {{ :plugin:configmanager.png?350\|The Configuration Manager - Field colors: blue = default, white = local change, light red = protected setting}} |     | {{ :plugin:configmanager.png?350\|The Configuration Manager - Field colors: blue = default, white = local change, light red = protected setting}} |
|     | The Config Manager allows wiki \[\[config:superuser\|administrators\]\] to easily alter the wiki \[\[:config\|configuration\]\] settings online from the comfort of their favorite web browser. This plugin manages basic DokuWiki configurations as well as \[\[devel:configuration\|other settings\]\] for installed \[\[:plugins\]\] and currently used \[\[:template\]\]. |     | The Config Manager allows wiki \[\[config:superuser\|administrators\]\] to easily alter the wiki \[\[:config\|configuration\]\] settings online from the comfort of their favorite web browser. This plugin manages basic DokuWiki configurations as well as \[\[devel:configuration\|other settings\]\] for installed \[\[:plugins\]\] and currently used \[\[:template\]\]. |
| Line 20: |     | Line 22: |     |
|     | \===== Usage ===== |     | \===== Usage ===== |
|     |     |     |     |
| \-  | The Config Manager is accessible from the admin screen (Login as superuser, click "Admin" and choose "Configuration Settings"). | +   | The Config Manager is accessible from the admin screen (Login as superuser, click "Admin" and choose "**{{https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dokuwiki/dokuwiki/master/lib/plugins/config/admin.svg?14}}** Configuration Settings"). |
|     |     |     |     |
|     | Settings are shown with different backgrounds to highlight their current status. |     | Settings are shown with different backgrounds to highlight their current status. |
| Line 29: |     | Line 31: |     |
|     | Modify settings to your needs and save it by using the ''Save'' button at bottom of the page, by pressing 'Enter' in a textbox or by using the \[\[:accesskey\]\] of your browser: ''<accesskey> + S'' |     | Modify settings to your needs and save it by using the ''Save'' button at bottom of the page, by pressing 'Enter' in a textbox or by using the \[\[:accesskey\]\] of your browser: ''<accesskey> + S'' |
|     |     |     |     |
| \-  | \====How is your config saved ==== | +   | \==== How is your config saved ==== |
|     | On saving changed settings this plugin will copy the current local settings file (''conf/local.php'') to ''conf/local.php.bak'' and save the updated settings to ''conf/local.php''.  It will never make any changes to the default settings stored in ''conf/dokuwiki.php''.  However, any settings found in ''conf/local.php'' will override the default settings as explained in the \[\[:config\|configuration options page\]\]. |     | On saving changed settings this plugin will copy the current local settings file (''conf/local.php'') to ''conf/local.php.bak'' and save the updated settings to ''conf/local.php''.  It will never make any changes to the default settings stored in ''conf/dokuwiki.php''.  However, any settings found in ''conf/local.php'' will override the default settings as explained in the \[\[:config\|configuration options page\]\]. |
|     |     |     |     |

Any settings found in ''conf/local.protected.php'' will be displayed by the plugin surrounded in light-red to indicate their protected status. Editing of protected values is disabled. |     | This way, it is ensured that any values previously set from ''conf/dokuwiki.php'' and ''conf/local.php'' will be overridden by protected values from ''conf/local.protected.php''. Any settings found in ''conf/local.protected.php'' will be displayed by the plugin surrounded in light-red to indicate their protected status. Editing of protected values is disabled. |
|     |     |     |     |
| \-  | The loading order of configuration files is controlled by the global ''$config\_cascade'' variable **in the DokuWiki release 2009-02-14 and above**. | +   | The loading order of configuration files is controlled by the global ''**\[\[devel:preload\|**$config\_cascade**\]\]**'' variable. |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\=== Example ===** |
|     |     |     |     |
| \-  | \===Example=== |     |     |
|     | <code php conf/local.protected.php> |     | <code php conf/local.protected.php> |
|     | <?php |     | <?php |
| Line 65: |     | Line 69: |     |
|     | \*/ |     | \*/ |
|     | $conf\['useacl'\] = 1; |     | $conf\['useacl'\] = 1; |
| \-  | </code> |     |     |
| \-  |     |     |     |
| \-  | \==For 2008-05-05 release and below== |     |     |
| \-  | Meanwhile, in the release 2008-05-05 and below this plugin used to add the following line to the bottom of ''conf/local.php'' to load protected settings. |     |     |
| \-  |     |     |     |
| \-  | <code php> |     |     |
| \-  | @include(DOKU\_CONF.'local.protected.php'); |     |     |
|     | </code> |     | </code> |
|     |     |     |     |
| Line 84: |     | Line 81: |     |
|     |     |     |     |
|     | When this happens, the save button won't be shown. |     | When this happens, the save button won't be shown. |
| \-  |     |     |     |
| \-  | \===== User Questions ===== |     |     |
|     |     |     |     |
|     | \==== Triangle, Exclamation and Padlock Mark ==== |     | \==== Triangle, Exclamation and Padlock Mark ==== |
|     |     |     |     |
|     | Some fields in the configuration page show: |     | Some fields in the configuration page show: |
| \-  | \* A yellow warning sign, or | +   | \* A yellow warning sign **({{:config:warning.png?nolink\|}})** , or |
| \-  | \* An exclamation mark in a red circle, or | +   | \* An exclamation mark in a red circle **({{:config:danger.png?nolink\|}})**, or |
| \-  | \* The drawing of a padlock | +   | \* The drawing of a padlock **({{:config:security.png?nolink\|}})** |
|     |     |     |     |
| \-  | These are the meanings of these three **simbols**:\\\\ | +   | These are the meanings of these three **symbols**:\\\\ |
| \-  | \*\*Yellow Mark\*\* ⇒ changing this option may result in undesirable behaviors.\\\\ | +   | **{{:config:warning.png?nolink\|}}** \*\*Yellow Mark\*\* ⇒ changing this option may result in undesirable behaviors.\\\\ |
| \-  | \*\*Red circle\*\* ⇒ changing this option could make your wiki and the configuration menu inaccessible.\\\\ | +   | **{{:config:danger.png?nolink\|}}** \*\*Red circle\*\* ⇒ changing this option could make your wiki and the configuration menu inaccessible.\\\\ |
| \-  | \*\*Padlock\*\* ⇒ changing this option could present a security risk.\\\\ | +   | **{{:config:security.png?nolink\|}}** \*\*Padlock\*\* ⇒ changing this option could present a security risk.\\\\ |
|     |     |     |     |
|     | Please, keep attention when you change these fields. |     | Please, keep attention when you change these fields. |
| \-  |     |     |     |
| \-  |     |     |     |
| \-  | \==== Path Strings ==== |     |     |
| \-  | I have an issue with the configuration data of the "source"\-plugin that probably affects other plugins with path strings as well: |     |     |
| \-  | When putting a path string to the "location" field, e.g. \\\\ |     |     |
| \-  | <code php> |     |     |
| \-  | E:\\ |     |     |
| \-  | </code> |     |     |
| \-  | it will be saved like this to the local.php: \\\\ |     |     |
| \-  | <code php> |     |     |
| \-  | $conf\['plugin'\]\['source'\]\['location'\] = 'E:\\\\' |     |     |
| \-  | </code> |     |     |
| \-  | With this content the "source"\-plugin will work.\\\\ |     |     |
| \-  | Re-opening the configuration manager page the content of the "location" field is auto-filled from the local.php with \\\\ |     |     |
| \-  | <code php> |     |     |
| \-  | 'E:\\' |     |     |
| \-  | </code> |     |     |
| \-  | Saving now the configuration once more (by only changing any arbitrary other parameter to force saving) the value in the local.php becomes |     |     |
| \-  | <code php> |     |     |
| \-  | $conf\['plugin'\]\['source'\]\['location'\] = '\\'E:\\\\\\'' |     |     |
| \-  | </code> |     |     |
| \-  | and the "source"\-plugin fails. For non-path strings there seems to be no such problem so the issue must be related to this double-backslash. Can you help?\\\\ |     |     |
| \-  | P.S.: Sorry, I couldn't find any other appropriate place to report about this. |     |     |
| \-  |     |     |     |
| \-  | \> There is a link to where to report \[\[https://github.com/splitbrain/dokuwiki/issues\|bugs\]\] right at the top of every page here. \[\[https://www.google.com/search?q=dokuwiki+bugs\|Googling "DokuWiki bugs"\]\] also gives satisfactory results. --- \[\[user>ach\|Anika Henke\]\] //2015-09-05 14:45// |     |     |

*   [Configuration Manager Plugin](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config?rev=1457917858#configuration_manager_plugin)
    
    *   [Description](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config?rev=1457917858#description)
        
    *   [Usage](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config?rev=1457917858#usage)
        
        *   [How is your config saved](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config?rev=1457917858#how_is_your_config_saved)
            
        *   [Protecting Settings](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config?rev=1457917858#protecting_settings)
            
        *   [File Permissions](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config?rev=1457917858#file_permissions)
            
    *   [User Questions](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config?rev=1457917858#user_questions)
        
        *   [Triangle, Exclamation and Padlock Mark](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config?rev=1457917858#triangle_exclamation_and_padlock_mark)
            
        *   [Path Strings](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config?rev=1457917858#path_strings)
            

Configuration Manager Plugin
============================

Compatible with DokuWiki

(bundled)

[![plugin](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/plugins/pluginrepo/images/dwplugin.png)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins)
 Manage your wiki's configuration settings (bundled with DokuWiki)

[![](https://www.dokuwiki.org/_media/plugin:configmanager.png?w=220&tok=dd491d)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/_media/plugin:configmanager.png "Screenshot of config")

Last updated on

2014-03-18

Provides

[Admin](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins?plugintype=2#extension__table "List all Admin plugins")

Similar to [settingstree](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:settingstree "plugin:settingstree")

Tagged with [!bundled](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins?plugintag=%21bundled#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [configuration](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins?plugintag=configuration#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [options](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins?plugintag=options#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [settings](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins?plugintag=settings#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")

Needed for [settingstree](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:settingstree "plugin:settingstree")

**By [Christopher Smith](mailto:chris%20%5Bat%5D%20jalakai%20%5Bdot%5D%20co%20%5Bdot%5D%20uk "chris [at] jalakai [dot] co [dot] uk")
**

*   [usermanager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:usermanager "plugin:usermanager")
    
*   [source](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:source "plugin:source")
    
*   [googlemaps](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:googlemaps "plugin:googlemaps")
    
*   [iframe](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:iframe "plugin:iframe")
    
*   [linebreak](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:linebreak "plugin:linebreak")
    
*   [outdent](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:outdent "plugin:outdent")
    
*   [camelcase](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:camelcase "plugin:camelcase")
    
*   [xbr](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:xbr "plugin:xbr")
    
*   [box](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:box "plugin:box")
    
*   [sidebar](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:sidebar "template:sidebar")
    
*   and 3 more

Description
-----------

[![The Configuration Manager - Field colors: blue = default, white = local change, light red = protected setting](https://www.dokuwiki.org/_media/plugin:configmanager.png?w=350&tok=ad5956 "The Configuration Manager - Field colors: blue = default, white = local change, light red = protected setting")](https://www.dokuwiki.org/_detail/plugin:configmanager.png?id=plugin%3Aconfig "plugin:configmanager.png")
 The Config Manager allows wiki [administrators](https://www.dokuwiki.org/config:superuser "config:superuser")
 to easily alter the wiki [configuration](https://www.dokuwiki.org/config "config")
 settings online from the comfort of their favorite web browser. This plugin manages basic DokuWiki configurations as well as [other settings](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:configuration "devel:configuration")
 for installed [plugins](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins "plugins")
 and currently used [template](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template "template")
.

Usage
-----

The Config Manager is accessible from the admin screen (Login as superuser, click “Admin” and choose “Configuration Settings”).

Settings are shown with different backgrounds to highlight their current status.

*   A blue background is used to show default values (`conf/dokuwiki.php`), eg. values that have not been modified by the user.
    
*   A white background indicates local changes (`conf/local.php`).
    
*   A light red background shows protected settings (`conf/local.protected.php`) which can not be modified.
    

Modify settings to your needs and save it by using the `Save` button at bottom of the page, by pressing 'Enter' in a textbox or by using the [accesskey](https://www.dokuwiki.org/accesskeys "accesskeys")
 of your browser: `<accesskey> + S`

### How is your config saved

On saving changed settings this plugin will copy the current local settings file (`conf/local.php`) to `conf/local.php.bak` and save the updated settings to `conf/local.php`. It will never make any changes to the default settings stored in `conf/dokuwiki.php`. However, any settings found in `conf/local.php` will override the default settings as explained in the [configuration options page](https://www.dokuwiki.org/config "config")
.

The plugin adds the following lines to the top of `conf/local.php` when it updates it:

[conf/local.php](https://www.dokuwiki.org/_export/code/plugin:config?codeblock=0 "Download Snippet")

/\*
 \* DokuWiki's Main Configuration File - Local Settings 
 \* Auto-generated by config plugin 
 \* Run for user: <username>
 \* Date: <current date/time, rfc 2822 format (day, dd MMM YYYY hh:mm:ss TZ)>
 \*/

### Protecting Settings

You can protect certain settings by placing them in `conf/local.protected.php` (create the file if it doesn't exist).

By default DokuWiki loads its configuration files in the following order:

1.  `conf/dokuwiki.php`
    
2.  `conf/local.php`
    
3.  `conf/local.protected.php`
    

This way, it is ensured that any values previously set from `conf/dokuwiki.php` and `conf/local.php` will be overridden by protected values from `conf/local.protected.php`. Any settings found in `conf/local.protected.php` will be displayed by the plugin surrounded in light-red to indicate their protected status. Editing of protected values is disabled.

The loading order of configuration files is controlled by the global `$config_cascade` variable in the DokuWiki release 2009-02-14 and above.

#### Example

[conf/local.protected.php](https://www.dokuwiki.org/_export/code/plugin:config?codeblock=1 "Download Snippet")

<?php
/\*\*
 \* Protected settings
 \* Do override DokuWiki default settings and local settings from Config Manager
 \*/
$conf\['useacl'\] \= 1;

##### For 2008-05-05 release and below

Meanwhile, in the release 2008-05-05 and below this plugin used to add the following line to the bottom of `conf/local.php` to load protected settings.

@include(DOKU\_CONF.'local.protected.php');

### File Permissions

To be able to save the configuration data, the file permissions of `conf/local.php` needs to be writable by the webserver, as well as the configuration directory itself. Refer to [permissions](https://www.dokuwiki.org/install:permissions "install:permissions")
 on details how set file permissions on various systems.

When the plugin detects that the config file can not be written, it will show a message box at the top of the page that says

> “The settings file can not be updated, if this is unintentional, ensure the local settings file name and permissions are correct.”

When this happens, the save button won't be shown.

User Questions
--------------

### Triangle, Exclamation and Padlock Mark

Some fields in the configuration page show:

*   A yellow warning sign, or
    
*   An exclamation mark in a red circle, or
    
*   The drawing of a padlock
    

These are the meanings of these three simbols:  
**Yellow Mark** ⇒ changing this option may result in undesirable behaviors.  
**Red circle** ⇒ changing this option could make your wiki and the configuration menu inaccessible.  
**Padlock** ⇒ changing this option could present a security risk.  

Please, keep attention when you change these fields.

### Path Strings

I have an issue with the configuration data of the “source”-plugin that probably affects other plugins with path strings as well: When putting a path string to the “location” field, e.g.  

E:\\

it will be saved like this to the local.php:  

$conf\['plugin'\]\['source'\]\['location'\] \= 'E:\\\\'

With this content the “source”-plugin will work.  
Re-opening the configuration manager page the content of the “location” field is auto-filled from the local.php with  

'E:\\'

Saving now the configuration once more (by only changing any arbitrary other parameter to force saving) the value in the local.php becomes

$conf\['plugin'\]\['source'\]\['location'\] \= '\\'E:\\\\\\''

and the “source”-plugin fails. For non-path strings there seems to be no such problem so the issue must be related to this double-backslash. Can you help?  
P.S.: Sorry, I couldn't find any other appropriate place to report about this.

> There is a link to where to report [bugs](https://github.com/splitbrain/dokuwiki/issues "https://github.com/splitbrain/dokuwiki/issues")
>  right at the top of every page here. [Googling "DokuWiki bugs"](https://www.google.com/search?q=dokuwiki+bugs "https://www.google.com/search?q=dokuwiki+bugs")
>  also gives satisfactory results. — [Anika Henke](https://forum.dokuwiki.org/u/ach "https://forum.dokuwiki.org/u/ach")
>  _2015-09-05 14:45_
