wikiweko Template
=================

Compatible with DokuWiki

Lemming, Anteater, Rincewind, Angua, Adora Belle, Weatherwax, Binky, Ponder Stibbons, Hrun, Detritus, Elenor of Tsort, Frusterick Manners, Greebo, Hogfather

*   [Download](https://github.com/drbeco/dokuwiki-wikiweko-template/releases/latest)
    
*   [Report bugs](https://github.com/drbeco/dokuwiki-wikiweko-template/issues)
    

[![template](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/plugins/pluginrepo/images/dwplugin.png)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/templates)
 Gives you a all-devices friendly 2021 MediaWiki/Wikipedia Look-and-Feel for DokuWiki

Last updated on

2021-06-06

Repository

[Source](https://github.com/drbeco/dokuwiki-wikiweko-template)

Conflicts with

[vector](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector "template:vector")

This extension has not been updated in over 2 years. It may no longer be maintained or supported and may have compatibility issues.

Tagged with [!discontinued](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template?plugintag=%21discontinued#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [mediawiki](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template?plugintag=mediawiki#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [vector](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template?plugintag=vector#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")
, [wikipedia](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template?plugintag=wikipedia#extension__table "List all plugins with this tag")

**By [beco](mailto:rcb%20%5Bat%5D%20beco%20%5Bdot%5D%20cc "rcb [at] beco [dot] cc")
**

*   [timezoneco](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:timezoneco "plugin:timezoneco")
    

Edit

About
-----

 _![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) Discontinued_

“wikiweko for DokuWiki” is based on [vector](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template:vector "template:vector")
, and gives you a “Wikipedia” look and feel.

The aim of this project is to improve the current vector template to include mobile responsiveness to it. The project is currently in the early stages and due to other priorities it might be stalled for a long time. The good news is that a simple change to “viewport” allowed to give a good mobile responsiveness to it, so it is already very nice to use.

Always check for other templates options and release dates to be sure to use good updated code (including checking this one as well).

Edit

Download and Install
--------------------

Use the following URL to download this template:

*   [https://github.com/drbeco/dokuwiki-wikiweko-template/releases/latest](https://github.com/drbeco/dokuwiki-wikiweko-template/releases/latest "https://github.com/drbeco/dokuwiki-wikiweko-template/releases/latest")
    

Refer to [template](https://www.dokuwiki.org/template "template")
 on how to install and use templates in [DokuWiki](https://www.dokuwiki.org/dokuwiki "dokuwiki")
.

Edit

Sites using this Template
-------------------------

# it:install:upgrade [DokuWiki]

it:install:upgrade

### Indice

*   [Aggiornamento](https://www.dokuwiki.org/it:install:upgrade#aggiornamento)
    
    *   [File da rimuovere](https://www.dokuwiki.org/it:install:upgrade#file_da_rimuovere)
        
    *   [Risoluzione problemi](https://www.dokuwiki.org/it:install:upgrade#risoluzione_problemi)
        
    *   [Metodi alternativi](https://www.dokuwiki.org/it:install:upgrade#metodi_alternativi)
        
    *   [Riconoscimenti](https://www.dokuwiki.org/it:install:upgrade#riconoscimenti)
        

Aggiornamento
=============

Prima di aggiornare dovresti sempre leggere il [changelog](http://www.dokuwiki.org/changes "http://www.dokuwiki.org/changes")
 per vedere se devi stare attento a qualcosa che è cambiato durante l'aggiornamento.

Per determinare la versione che stai utilizzando dai un'occhiata al codice HTML sorgente della pagina generata da DokuWiki - dovrebbe esserci qualcosa come `<meta name=“generator” content=“DokuWiki 2005-02-06” />`.

Il metodo più semplice per aggiornare è quello di seguire questi passi:

1.  **Fai un backup completo del tuo wiki** (meglio essere al sicuro prima che dispiaciuti dopo)
    
    *   se hai modificato il file .htaccess originale fornito dall'archivio di DokuWiki (ad esempio per [rewrite](http://www.dokuwiki.org/rewrite "http://www.dokuwiki.org/rewrite")
        ) fai particolare attenzione a salvare una copia
        
    *    cp -Ra /percorso/del/wiki/\* /percorso/del/wikibackup 
        
2.  [Scarica](http://download.dokuwiki.org/ "http://download.dokuwiki.org/")
     e [scompatta](http://www.dokuwiki.org/install:unpacking "http://www.dokuwiki.org/install:unpacking")
     la nuova versione; verifica il [Changelog](http://www.dokuwiki.org/changes "http://www.dokuwiki.org/changes")
    
    *    tar -xzvf dokuwiki-xxxx-xx-xx.tgz
        
3.  Copia/Carica tutti i file nella vecchia installazione di DokuWiki sovrascrivendo tutti i file esistenti
    
    *    'cp' -rf dokuwiki-xxxx-xx-xx/\* /percorso/del/wiki/
        
    *   Il comando “cp” scritto tra apici assicura che il comando funzioni anche quando esista un alias a cp -i
        
    *   Verifica se tutti i file sono “nuovi” , altrimenti prova:
        
    *   unalias cp
        cp -rf dokuwiki-xxxx-xx-xx/\* /percorso/del/wiki/
        
4.  Rimuovi i vecchi file che non sono più usati (vedi sotto per un elenco dei file)
    
5.  Sistema se necessario i [permessi](https://www.dokuwiki.org/install:permissions "install:permissions")
    ; incluse possibilmente le nuove directory all'interno di `data/` come `index/` oppure `tmp/`
    
6.  Verifica il file .htaccess per le modifiche necessarie (vedi passo 1 all'inizio: Fai un backup completo…)
    
7.  Aggiorna i plugins
    

I passi elencati sopra sono sicuri quando si aderisce all'avviso di cambiare soltanto le versioni locali dei tuoi file di configurazione (come `conf/local.php` invece di `conf/dokuwiki.php`). DokuWiki non sovrascriverà quei file locali. Se hai sempre usato la funzione [Gestione Plugin](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config "plugin:config")
 sei al sicuro visto che questa salva sempre il file in local.php. I dati utente e le informazioni [ACL](https://www.dokuwiki.org/acl "acl")
 non devono mai essere sovrascritte dal momento che DokuWiki contiene solo pochi esempi (con estensione `.dist`).

Modifica

Coloro che utilizzano un accesso tramite console per connettersi al server possono copiare ed incollare il testo in un file presente nel sistema, successivamente eseguire i comandi per verificare e rimuovere quei files. Soltanto i file presenti vengono cancellati. Ho usato il nome del file /tmp/removeold.txt per salvare un elenco dei file copiati da qui.

for f in \`cat /tmp/removeold.txt\`
do

if \[ -f $f \] ; then
        ls -l $f
        rm  $f
fi

done

Alternativamente, utilizzare questa riga di comando. Se sei paranoico, sostituisci il comando “rm -rf” con “ls -la” per vedere quali file saranno cancellati. Puoi lasciare i commenti e le righe vuote, ma esse produranno errori e avvisi.

cat /tmp/removeold.txt | xargs -n 1 rm -rf

Modifica

Risoluzione problemi
--------------------

Se riscontri alcune anomalie nel comportamento di [DokuWiki](https://www.dokuwiki.org/it:dokuwiki "it:dokuwiki")
 dopo l'aggiornamento, dovresti cancellare i file della cache presenti in `data/cache/`. Devi essere sicuro che il tuo browser non abbia vecchi fogli di stile e script JavaScript nella cache semplicemente ricaricando la pagina (Shift-F5 oppure Ctrl-Shift-R nella maggior parte dei browser).

Pagine relative che si potrebbero applicare:

*   [updatecheck](https://www.dokuwiki.org/config:updatecheck "config:updatecheck")
     – Se le notifiche di aggiornamento persistono
    
*   [toolbar](https://www.dokuwiki.org/faq:toolbar "faq:toolbar")
     – Problemi con i pulsanti e con JavaScript
    

Modifica

Metodi alternativi
------------------

Qui vengono descritti alcuni diversi metodi di Aggiornamento forniti dagli utenti. Alcuni di essi potrebbero essere non aggiornati.

*   [Aggiornamento mediante creazione diffs](http://www.dokuwiki.org/install:diffupgrade "http://www.dokuwiki.org/install:diffupgrade")
    
*   [Aggiornamento mediante APS](http://apscatalog.com/1/splitbrain.org/dokuwiki/ "http://apscatalog.com/1/splitbrain.org/dokuwiki/")
     - qualcuno lo ha mai provato?
    

Modifica

Riconoscimenti
--------------

Pagina creata e aggiornata da **Diego Pierotto**

Modifica

    *   [Gebruikersmanager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:admin_window#gebruikersmanager)
        
    *   [Uitbreidingen beheren](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:admin_window#uitbreidingen_beheren)
        
    *   [Herstelmanager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:admin_window#herstelmanager)
        
    *   [Configuratie-instellingen](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:admin_window#configuratie-instellingen)
        
    *   [Populariteitsfeedback](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:admin_window#populariteitsfeedback)
        

Beheervenster
=============

Als je [ACL](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:acl "nl:acl")
 gebruikt én je bent ingelogd én je hebt genoeg rechten, dan zul je en `Beheer` knop zien op je pagina. Klikken op deze knop brengt je naar DokuWiki's Beheermenu. Het standaard menu voor beheerders ([superusers](https://www.dokuwiki.org/config:superuser "config:superuser")
) is:

*   [Toegangsrechten beheer](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:admin_window#toegangsrechten_beheer "nl:admin_window ↵")
    
*   [Gebruikersmanager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:admin_window#gebruikersmanager "nl:admin_window ↵")
    
*   [Uitbreidingen beheren](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:admin_window#uitbreidingen_beheren "nl:admin_window ↵")
    
*   [Herstelmanager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:admin_window#herstelmanager "nl:admin_window ↵")
    
*   [Configuratie-instellingen](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:admin_window#configuratie-instellingen "nl:admin_window ↵")
    
*   [Populariteitsfeedback](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:admin_window#populariteitsfeedback "nl:admin_window ↵")
    

[Beheerplugins](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins?plugintype=2#extension__table "plugins")
 kunnen andere keuzes aan het menu toevoegen.

Gebruikers met “[Manager rechten](https://www.dokuwiki.org/config:manager "config:manager")
” zullen een vergelijkbaar menu zien, waar sommige keuze zijn weggelaten.

Aanpassen

Toegangsrechten beheer
----------------------

Dit gedeelte laat je rechten instellen voor pagina's en namespaces. Zie [ACL](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:acl "nl:acl")
 voor meer informatie.

Aanpassen

Gebruikersmanager
-----------------

Dit brengt je naar een scherm waar je jouw gebruikers en hun profielen kun beheren. Zie [gebruikersmanager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:usermanager "plugin:usermanager")
.

Aanpassen

Uitbreidingen beheren
---------------------

Op deze pagina kun je alles beheren wat te maken heeft met DokuWiki extensies(plugins en templates). Om plugins te kunnen downloaden en installeren moet de plugin map beschrijfbaar zijn voor de webserver, en voor templates de template map. Zie [extensie manager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:extension "plugin:extension")
.

Aanpassen

Herstelmanager
--------------

Deze pagina helpt je met een automatisch herstellen van een spamaanval. Zie [herstelmanager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:revert "plugin:revert")
.

Aanpassen

Configuratie-instellingen
-------------------------

Gebruik deze pagina om de instellingen van je DokuWiki installatie aan te passen. Voor hulp bij individuele instellingen verwijzen we je naar [config](https://www.dokuwiki.org/nl:config "nl:config")
. Voor meer details over deze plugin zie [configuratiemanager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config "plugin:config")
.

Aanpassen

Populariteitsfeedback
---------------------

Dit instrument verzamelt anonieme informatie over je wiki en maak het mogelijk die terug te sturen naar de DokuWikiontwikkelaars. Dit helpt hen te begrijpen hoe DokuWiki wordt gebruikt door haar gebruikers en zorgt er voor dat toekomstige ontwerpbeslissingen worden ondersteund door echte gebruikerstatistieken. Zie [populariteit plugin](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:popularity "plugin:popularity")
.

Aanpassen

nl/admin\_window.txt · Laatst gewijzigd: 2018-05-30 20:15 door Klap-in

* * *

![](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/exe/taskrunner.php?id=nl%3Aadmin_window&1752069411)

---

# mime [DokuWiki]

mime

### Table of Contents

*   [MIME configuration](https://www.dokuwiki.org/mime#mime_configuration)
    
    *   [Adding additional Mime Types](https://www.dokuwiki.org/mime#adding_additional_mime_types)
        
        *   [File type icons](https://www.dokuwiki.org/mime#file_type_icons)
            
    *   [Default Mime Types](https://www.dokuwiki.org/mime#default_mime_types)
        
    *   [See also](https://www.dokuwiki.org/mime#see_also)
        

MIME configuration
==================

Which file types you can upload via the [media manager popup](https://www.dokuwiki.org/media_manager "media_manager")
 or the [fullscreen media manager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/fullscreen_mediamanager "fullscreen_mediamanager")
 is configured through the `[conf/mime.conf](https://github.com/dokuwiki/dokuwiki/blob/master/conf/mime.conf "https://github.com/dokuwiki/dokuwiki/blob/master/conf/mime.conf") ` file. It also configures the file extension ↔ mimetype association.

For security reasons it is not possible to configure [DokuWiki](https://www.dokuwiki.org/dokuwiki "dokuwiki")
 to allow any file type.

![:!:](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/exclaim.svg) **Never enable HTML upload for unprotected wikis**, as this opens Cross Site Scripting vulnerabilities through JavaScript. Only enable this with trusted users. You need to disable the [iexssprotect](https://www.dokuwiki.org/config:iexssprotect "config:iexssprotect")
 option additionally to adding the HTML mime type in the config file.

Edit

Adding additional Mime Types
----------------------------

Additional mimetypes should be added in `mime.local.conf` (you need to create this file). The file expects an extension (without the dot) and a mime type. Prefixing the mime type with an exclamation mark (`!`) will force the browser to present a download dialog, even if a browser plugin for the file in question exists.

Example:

[conf/mime.local.conf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/_export/code/mime?codeblock=0 "Download Snippet")

\# this would play in the browser (if supported):
wav         audio/wav

# this would be downloaded
wav         !audio/wav

Disable by mention the extension _without_ a mimetype. Disabling png-images by:

[conf/mime.local.conf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/_export/code/mime?codeblock=1 "Download Snippet")

png

For configuration changes to take effect on the pages, the [cache must be purged](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:caching "devel:caching")
.

Edit

### File type icons

File type icons can be added by placing an image SVG file named after the file extension into `lib/images/fileicons/svg/`. Note: because the stylesheet used for assigning the fileicons gets [cached](https://www.dokuwiki.org/caching "caching")
 you need to force a rebuild by touching one of the config files or just save the [Configuration Manager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config "plugin:config")
 another time.

Edit

Default Mime Types
------------------

The default install contains the following configurations:

| jpg | image/jpeg | ![](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/exe/fetch.php?w=16&tok=900dd3&media=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dokuwiki.org%2Flib%2Fimages%2Ffileicons%2Fsvg%2Fjpg.svg) |

mime.txt · Last modified: 2025-02-06 19:57 by andi

* * *

![](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/exe/taskrunner.php?id=mime&1752069411)

---

# de:config [DokuWiki]

de:config

### Inhaltsverzeichnis

*   [DokuWiki konfigurieren](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:config#dokuwiki_konfigurieren)
    
    *   [Was kann im DokuWiki konfiguriert werden?](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:config#was_kann_im_dokuwiki_konfiguriert_werden)
        
    *   [Zusammenfassung der Konfigurationsdateien](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:config#zusammenfassung_der_konfigurationsdateien)
        
    *   [Konfiguration Einstellungen](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:config#konfiguration_einstellungen)
        
        *   [Verfügbare Einstellungen](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:config#verfuegbare_einstellungen)
            

DokuWiki konfigurieren
======================

Die meisten Eigenschaften dieses DokuWiki können durch diverse Optionen konfiguriert werden. Der einfachste Weg die Konfiguration zu bearbeiten ist das Benutzen des [Konfigurations Managers](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config "plugin:config")
, mit welchem Administratoren die Einstellungen ihrer DokuWiki-Installation bequem über ihren bevorzugten Webbrowser ändern können.

Um den Konfigurationsmanager zu starten, melde dich als superuser an und klicke auf die Admin-Schaltfläche.

Bearbeiten

Was kann im DokuWiki konfiguriert werden?
-----------------------------------------

Die DokuWiki-Standardeinstellungen, also in anderen Worten, die „Systemeinstellungen“ der Wiki-Software im Urzustand unmittelbar nach der Installation, sind in der Datei `conf/dokuwiki.php` zu finden. Für jegliche Benutzerdefinierten Anpassungen dient jedoch die Datei `conf/local.php`. Falls noch nicht vorhanden, sollte diese zunächst erstellt werden. Innerhalb dieser Datei können Sie anschließend die Konfiguration von DokuWiki bearbeiten. Eine Liste verfügbarer Optionen ist am Ende dieser Seite zu finden.

Benutzernamen, (verschlüsselte) Passwörter und Zugriffskontroll-Regeln werden den Dateien [users.auth.php und acl.auth.php](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:acl "de:acl")
 gespeichert.

Wenn Sie eine neue Datei mit dem Mediamanager hochladen möchten, können Sie auf die Nachricht `„Upload denied. This file extension is forbidden!“` stoßen. Dies Verhalten ist in der Datei `conf/mime.conf` geregelt. Um einen neuen Datei-Typ hochzuladen, müssen Sie diesen in der Datei [mime.conf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:mime "de:mime")
 bestimmen.

Einige Einstellungen werden automatisch geändert, wenn sie Ihre Seiten ändern. Einige erstellen Tooltips, Smileys oder spezielle Zeichen. Diese Verhalten wird in [acronyms.conf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:abbreviations "de:abbreviations")
, [smileys.conf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:smileys "de:smileys")
 oder [entities.conf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:entities "de:entities")
 eingestellt.

Bearbeiten

Zusammenfassung der Konfigurationsdateien
-----------------------------------------

Alle Konfigurationsdateien befinden sich im `./conf` Ordner bzw. in `/etc/dokuwiki`, wenn ein Debian Paket installiert wird.

„Hauptdateien“ werden normalerweise mit DokuWiki geliefert, hingegen müssen „lokale Dateien“ vom Wiki-Administrator erzeugt werden.

Falls lokale Dateien unterstützt werden, sollten Sie diese nutzen anstatt die Hauptdateien zu ändern, um Probleme beim Update zu vermeiden.

| Hauptdatei | lokale Datei | Konfigurationstyp | Schnellinfo |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `dokuwiki.php` | `local.php`  <br>`local.protected.php` | s.u. | Generelle Wiki Konfigurationen |
| `acronyms.conf` | `acronyms.local.conf` | [abbreviations](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:abbreviations "de:abbreviations") | Automatische Abkürzungstips |
| `entities.conf` | `entities.local.conf` | [entities](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:entities "de:entities") | Automatische Textersetzung |
| `interwiki.conf` | `interwiki.local.conf` | [interwiki](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:interwiki "de:interwiki") | Interwiki Kurzlinks |
| `mime.conf` | `mime.local.conf` | [mime](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:mime "de:mime") | Mimetyp-Einstellungen für Uploads |
| `smileys.conf` | `smileys.local.conf` | [smileys](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:smileys "de:smileys") | Graphische Ersatz-Smileys |
|     | `acl.auth.php` | siehe [acl](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:acl "de:acl") | Access-Control-Einstellungen |
|     | `users.auth.php` | siehe [acl](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:acl "de:acl") | Benutzer und Paßwörter |
| `mediameta.php` |     | [exif](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:exif "de:exif") | Metadaten für Bilder editierbar |
| `wordblock.conf` | `wordblock.local.conf` | [blacklist](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:blacklist "de:blacklist") | Spam-Blacklist |
|     | `userscript.js` | [javascript](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:javascript "devel:javascript") | Custom JavaScript Verbesserungen |
|     | `userstyle.css` | [css](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:css "devel:css") | Custom CSS Verbesserungen |

Bearbeiten

Bearbeiten

Konfiguration Einstellungen
---------------------------

Die meisten Einstellungen von [DokuWiki](https://www.dokuwiki.org/de:dokuwiki "de:dokuwiki")
 können über verschiedene Konfigurationseinstellungen eingestellt werden. Am einfachsten geht das mit dem [Configuration Manager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config "plugin:config")
.

Die verfügbaren Einstellungen sind unterhalb aufgelistet. Die Standardwerte stehen in der Datei `conf/dokuwiki.php`. Wenn Sie diese Einstellungen ändern wollen, verwenden Sie die Datei `conf/local.php` – dadurch wird sicher gestellt, dass diese speziellen Konfiguraionen nicht durch ein späteres Upgrade überschrieben werden. Der Konfigurationsmanager wird diese Datei ebenfalls verwenden.

Hier ist ein Beispiel `conf/local.php`:

<?php
$conf\['title'\]     \= 'Admin\\'s Wiki';
$conf\['useacl'\]    \= 1;
$conf\['superuser'\] \= 'admin';
?>

Some notes about the config file. The file is a piece of PHP code so the PHP syntax has to be preserved. E.g. each line has to have a semicolon at the end. There are multiple types of variables:

*   **Number**s can be written as is. Example: `9`
    
*   **String**s have to be enclosed in single or double quotes. Example: `'foo bar'`
    
*   **Boolean**s can be either `true` or `false` or `1` or `0`
    
*   **Array**s contain multiple values of one of the above types
    

Bearbeiten

---

# ko:config [DokuWiki]

ko:config

### 목차

*   [DokuWiki 설정](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:config#dokuwiki_%EC%84%A4%EC%A0%95)
    
    *   [설정할 수 있는 것](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:config#%EC%84%A4%EC%A0%95%ED%95%A0_%EC%88%98_%EC%9E%88%EB%8A%94_%EA%B2%83)
        
    *   [설정 파일들](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:config#%EC%84%A4%EC%A0%95_%ED%8C%8C%EC%9D%BC%EB%93%A4)
        
        *   [테마 설정 파일](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:config#%ED%85%8C%EB%A7%88_%EC%84%A4%EC%A0%95_%ED%8C%8C%EC%9D%BC)
            
    *   [플러그인 활성/비활성](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:config#%ED%94%8C%EB%9F%AC%EA%B7%B8%EC%9D%B8_%ED%99%9C%EC%84%B1_%EB%B9%84%ED%99%9C%EC%84%B1)
        
    *   [설정 옵션](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:config#%EC%84%A4%EC%A0%95_%EC%98%B5%EC%85%98)
        
        *   [이용 가능한 옵션](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:config#%EC%9D%B4%EC%9A%A9_%EA%B0%80%EB%8A%A5%ED%95%9C_%EC%98%B5%EC%85%98)
            
    *   [번역](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:config#%EB%B2%88%EC%97%AD)
        

DokuWiki 설정
===========

대부분의 DokuWiki 기능들은 다양한 설정 옵션을 통해 설정할 수 있습니다. 이런 설정 옵션들을 가장 쉽게 변경하는 방법은 [환경 설정 관리](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config "plugin:config")
를 사용하는 것 입니다. 이 방법은 위키 관리자가 온라인으로 브라우저를 사용하여 위키 설정을 바꿀 수 있게 합니다.

'환경 설정 관리'를 시작하기 위해서는 관리자로 로그인 하고, '관리' 버튼을 클릭하세요.

편집

설정할 수 있는 것
----------

DokuWiki의 시스템 옵션은 `conf/dokuwiki.php` 파일에 있습니다. 그러나, 이 파일은 시스템의 “기본값”이 저장되어 있습니다. 설정을 변경할려면 `conf/local.php`파일을 편집하거나 또는 이 파일이 없다면 만들어야 합니다. 이 파일에서 설정할 수 있는 옵션은 [사용 가능한 옵션](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:config#available_options "ko:config ↵")
을 참조하세요.

사용자 이름과 (암호화된) 패스워드 그리고 접근제어규칙은 conf 디렉터리에 있는 [users.auth.php 그리고 acl.auth.php](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:acl "ko:acl")
에 저장되어 있습니다.

미디어 관리에서 새로운 파일을 업로드할 때 `“업로드가 거부, 이 파일의 확장자는 허용되지 않습니다!”`라는 메시지를 볼 수 있습니다. 이 동작은 `conf/mime.conf` 파일에서 제어합니다. 새로운 종류의 파일을 업로드할려면 [mime.conf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:mime "ko:mime")
 파일에서 정의하세요.

페이지를 편집할 때 내용의 일부는 자동 변환이 이루어집니다. 툴팁(tooltips), 스마일 문자 또는 특수 문자입니다. 이러한 동작은 [acronyms.conf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:abbreviations "ko:abbreviations")
, [smileys.conf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:smileys "ko:smileys")
 또는 [entities.conf](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:entities "ko:entities")
 파일에서 제어됩니다.

편집

설정 파일들
------

Debian 패키지로 설치했을 경우 모든 설정 파일들은 `./conf` 폴더 또는 `/etc/dokuwiki` 폴더에 있습니다.

“기본 파일”은 DokuWiki에 포함되어 잇지만, “로컬 파일” 들은 위키 관리자가 작성해야 합니다.

로컬 파일이 지원되면, 기본 파일 대신 로컬 파일을 편집해야 업그레이드 문제를 피할 수 있습니다.

| 기본 파일 | 로컬 파일 | 설정 종류 | 기본 내용 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `dokuwiki.php` | `local.php`  <br>`local.protected.php` | 아래 참조 | 일반적인 wiki 설정 |
| `acronyms.conf` | `acronyms.local.conf` | [abbreviations](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:abbreviations "ko:abbreviations") | 자동 약어 힌트 |
| `entities.conf` | `entities.local.conf` | [entities](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:entities "ko:entities") | 자동 변환 문자열 |
| `interwiki.conf` | `interwiki.local.conf` | [interwiki](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:interwiki "ko:interwiki") | interwiki 링크s |
| `mime.conf` | `mime.local.conf` | [mime](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:mime "ko:mime") | 업로드 MIME 타입설정 |
| `smileys.conf` | `smileys.local.conf` | [smileys](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:smileys "ko:smileys") | 텍스트 → 이미지 변환 |
|     | `acl.auth.php` | [acl](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:acl "ko:acl")<br> 참조 | 접근 제어 설정 |
|     | `users.auth.php` | [acl](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:acl "ko:acl")<br> 참조 | 사용자와 암호 |
| `license.php` | `license.local.php` | [license](https://www.dokuwiki.org/config:license "config:license") | 사용가능한 라이센스 목록 |
| `scheme.conf` | `scheme.local.conf` | [urlschemes](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:urlschemes "ko:urlschemes") | 링크로 인식되는 URL 구성표 |
| `mediameta.php` |     | [exif](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:exif "ko:exif") | 편집가능한 이미지 Metadata |
| `wordblock.conf` | `wordblock.local.conf` | [blacklist](https://www.dokuwiki.org/ko:blacklist "ko:blacklist") | 스팸 블랙리스트 |
| `plugins.required.php` | `plugins.local.php`  <br>`plugins.protected.php` | 아래 참조 | 플러그인 활성/비활성 |
|     | `userscript.js` | [javascript](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:javascript "devel:javascript") | 사용자설정 JavaScript 확장 |
|     | `userstyle.css` | [css](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:css "devel:css") | 사용자설정 CSS 확장 |

편집

편집

### 테마 설정 파일

추가적인 설정 파일은 `/​var/​lib/​dokuwiki/​lib/​tpl/​dokuwiki`에서 찾을 수 있습니다.​ (데비안), 예를 들어 `​[​style.ini](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:%E2%80%8Bstyle.ini "devel:​style.ini") `​. Style.ini는 기본 테마파일이 읽어오는 텍스트 파일입니다. 그리고 사용자는 마음 내키는 대로 설정할 수 있습니다. (예:페이지의 배경 색상)

편집

플러그인 활성/비활성
-----------

설치된 플러그인은 기본으로 사용 가능하도록 활성화 된다. 이것들은 [플러그인 관리자](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:extension "plugin:extension")
를 사용하여 `plugins.local.php`파일에 기록하여 사용할 수 없도록 비활성화 할 수 있다. `conf/plugins.protected.php`에 기록하여 특정 플러그인을 보호하도록 할 수도 있다.

자동적으로 도쿠위키는 다음과 같은 순서로 해당 환경 설정 파일들을 로드합니다:

1.  `conf/plugins.php` – 기본 플러그인
    
2.  `conf/plugins.local.php` – 플러그인 매니저에 의해 변경된 플러그인
    
3.  `conf/plugins.required.php` – 플러그인 매니저로 변경할 수 없는 핵심 플러그인
    
4.  `conf/plugins.protected.php` – 다른 파일에 우선 적용되는 설정
    

설정파일의 로딩 순서는 전역변수 `$config_cascade`에 의해 제어됩니다. [preload.php](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:preload "devel:preload")
 파일을 사용하여 이 동작을 변경할 수 있습니다.

편집

설정 옵션
-----

\[DokuWiki\]\]의 대부분 기능들은 다양한 설정 옵션을 통해 설정할 수 있습니다. 이러한 옵션을 변경하는 가장 쉬운 방법은 [환경 설정 관리](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config "plugin:config")
를 사용하는 것입니다.

사용가능한 설정은 아래에 나열되어 있습니다. 그것들의 기본 값은 `conf/dokuwiki.php` 파일에 저장되어 있습니다. 설정을 변경하기를 원한다면 `conf/local.php`에서 변경해야 합니다. – 이는 이후 업그레이드에 의해 자신만의 설정이 변경되는 막을 수 있습니다. 환경설정 관리(config manager)에서도 이 파일을 사용할 수 있습니다. `conf/local.protected.php` 파일은 변경할 수 없는 환경 설정을 위해서도 사용할 수 있습니다.

여기에 `conf/local.php`의 샘플이 있습니다.:

<?php
$conf\['title'\]     \= "Admin's Wiki. ";
 
$conf\['useacl'\]    \= 1;
$conf\['superuser'\] \= 'admin';

설정 파일에 대한 몇가지 주의사항입니다. 이 파일은 PHP 코드로 취급되므로 PHP 문법이 지켜져야 합니다. 예를 들면 줄 끝에 세미콜론(;)을 붙이는 것입니다. 변수에도 여러 형식이 있습니다.

*   **숫자(Number)** 는 그대로 쓸수 있습니다. 예: `9`
    
*   **문자열(String)** 은 작은 따옴표(') 또는 큰 따옴표(“)로 묶어야 합니다. 예: `'foo bar'`
    
*   **부울(Boolean)** 은 `1` 또는 `0`입니다.
    
*   **배열(Array)** 은 위 형식 중 하나로 여러 값을 포함합니다.
    

편집

# devel:plugin_survey:deployment [DokuWiki]

devel:plugin\_survey:deployment

### Table of Contents

*   [Plugin Survey 2011 - Deployment](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:plugin_survey:deployment#plugin_survey_2011_-_deployment)
    
    *   [Bundled](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:plugin_survey:deployment#bundled)
        
    *   [Download package](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:plugin_survey:deployment#download_package)
        
    *   [Without plugin package](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:plugin_survey:deployment#without_plugin_package)
        

Plugin Survey 2011 - Deployment
===============================

(This is a part of the [plugin survey 2011](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:plugin_survey:start "devel:plugin_survey:start")
)

DokuWiki plugins are primarily made available through their respective homepage in the [plugin namespace](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins?idx=plugin "https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins?idx=plugin")
 of www.dokuwiki.org even if there are [more out there](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:plugin_survey:start#more_plugins "devel:plugin_survey:start")
 in the wild. Hopefully plugin homepages are published with the intent of making the plugin available to others (read more about [friendliness](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:plugin_survey:friendliness "devel:plugin_survey:friendliness")
). One of users' main objectives is to download and install the code. So which options are available at the moment?

Edit

Bundled
-------

A number of plugins have reached the status of “bundled” and are included in the official release. Besides their inherent compatibility, some additional testing, usefulness and ease of installation ![;-)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/smileys/wink.svg) there are no extra requirements on bundled plugins. 7 plugins (1%) are marked [!bundled](http://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins?plugintag=%21bundled "http://www.dokuwiki.org/plugins?plugintag=%21bundled")
 (i.e. included in the release).

*   [acl](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:acl "plugin:acl")
    , [config](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config "plugin:config")
    , [info](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:info "plugin:info")
    , [plugin](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:plugin "plugin:plugin")
    , [popularity](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:popularity "plugin:popularity")
    , [revert](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:revert "plugin:revert")
    , [usermanager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:usermanager "plugin:usermanager")
    

Actually there is an eighth bundled plugin, [safefnrecode](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:safefnrecode "plugin:safefnrecode")
, but it was not marked as bundled in the repository.

Edit

Download package
----------------

A convenient way of installing is by pasting an URL into the [plugin manager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:plugin "plugin:plugin")
. 704 pages (85%) have some sort of download link. In some cases, saved downloads from last years surveys could be used for code analysis. In total 715 downloaded packages were analyzed. Among those were 59 broken at the time of survey.

*   [aclmadeeasy](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:aclmadeeasy "plugin:aclmadeeasy")
    , [acronym4glossary](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:acronym4glossary "plugin:acronym4glossary")
    , [amazon\_heavy](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:amazon_heavy "plugin:amazon_heavy")
    , [autoincludeindex](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:autoincludeindex "plugin:autoincludeindex")
    , [backlinks](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:backlinks "plugin:backlinks")
    , [baselink](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:baselink "plugin:baselink")
    , [bibtex](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:bibtex "plugin:bibtex")
    , [blip](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:blip "plugin:blip")
    , [caltable](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:caltable "plugin:caltable")
    , [changemarks](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:changemarks "plugin:changemarks")
    , [chart](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:chart "plugin:chart")
    , [chord](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:chord "plugin:chord")
    , [classificationbanner](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:classificationbanner "plugin:classificationbanner")
    , [countdowndisplay](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:countdowndisplay "plugin:countdowndisplay")
    , [countdowntimer](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:countdowntimer "plugin:countdowntimer")
    , [dataloop](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:dataloop "plugin:dataloop")
    , [datapdo](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:datapdo "plugin:datapdo")
    , [delicious](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:delicious "plugin:delicious")
    , [diagram](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:diagram "plugin:diagram")
    , [dnsbl](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:dnsbl "plugin:dnsbl")
    , [dpicorrect](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:dpicorrect "plugin:dpicorrect")
    , [editformhelppage](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:editformhelppage "plugin:editformhelppage")
    , [ganalytics](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:ganalytics "plugin:ganalytics")
    , [google\_maps](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:google_maps "plugin:google_maps")
    , [google\_video](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:google_video "plugin:google_video")
    , [heise](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:heise "plugin:heise")
    , [html\_comment](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:html_comment "plugin:html_comment")
    , [interpro](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:interpro "plugin:interpro")
    , [jmol](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:jmol "plugin:jmol")
    , [keywordvoting](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:keywordvoting "plugin:keywordvoting")
    , [kixovar](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:kixovar "plugin:kixovar")
    , [linkext](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:linkext "plugin:linkext")
    , [mathoperation](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:mathoperation "plugin:mathoperation")
    , [md5gen](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:md5gen "plugin:md5gen")
    , [mediamanager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:mediamanager "plugin:mediamanager")
    , [nsrelation](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:nsrelation "plugin:nsrelation")
    , [nssize](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:nssize "plugin:nssize")
    , [oddeven](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:oddeven "plugin:oddeven")
    , [pdfdownload](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:pdfdownload "plugin:pdfdownload")
    , [pdfex](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:pdfex "plugin:pdfex")
    , [photoblox](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:photoblox "plugin:photoblox")
    , [ping](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:ping "plugin:ping")
    , [poll](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:poll "plugin:poll")
    , [progressbar](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:progressbar "plugin:progressbar")
    , [scrum](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:scrum "plugin:scrum")
    , [showfile](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:showfile "plugin:showfile")
    , [simpleweather](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:simpleweather "plugin:simpleweather")
    , [svgimg](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:svgimg "plugin:svgimg")
    , [tabtables](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:tabtables "plugin:tabtables")
    , [template\_switcher](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:template_switcher "plugin:template_switcher")
    , [top10](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:top10 "plugin:top10")
    , [traceroute](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:traceroute "plugin:traceroute")
    , [ueb](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:ueb "plugin:ueb")
    , [userhistory](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:userhistory "plugin:userhistory")
    , [webalbum](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:webalbum "plugin:webalbum")
    , [whois](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:whois "plugin:whois")
    , [wp\_most\_recent](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:wp_most_recent "plugin:wp_most_recent")
    , [xhtmlruby](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:xhtmlruby "plugin:xhtmlruby")
    , [youtubev2](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:youtubev2 "plugin:youtubev2")
    

#### Repository Buttons

Late 2009 the [repository plugin](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:repository "plugin:repository")
 introduced the possibility to add links to source code, bug tracker and a donate button. Since then developers and the [plugin & templates team](https://www.dokuwiki.org/teams:plugins_templates "teams:plugins_templates")
 has spread their use.

| Button | Plugins 2010 | Plugins 2011 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Download | 213 (32%) | 660 (80%) |
| Bugs | 150 (22%) | 255 (31%) |
| Repo | 138 (21%) | 247 (30%) |
| Donate | 85 (13%) | 106 (13%) |

Edit

#### Public repositories

There are many free download services. Sadly a lot of them could at best be described as annoying, for example 2shared, filefactory.com, mediafire.com, box.net and even sourceforge, requiring the user to view commercials and pressing a special download button. This will not work with the plugin manager. Some services even has automatic deletion of file not accessed within a certain time e.g. rapidshare.com. You should always check whether your selected host are compatible with the plugin manager.

But there are good alternatives as well. There is a clear trend for a common repository. Previous year 126 plugins where avaliable at [GitHub](http://www.github.com/ "http://www.github.com")
. Now 232 plugins are located on GitHub. This accounts for 33% of the plugins with download link.

| Year | Plugins @GitHub |
| --- | --- |
| 2009 | 22  |
| 2010 | 126 |
| 2011 | 232 |

Edit

#### External sites

90 plugins (11%) have their “Details and download” page somewhere outside [www.dokuwiki.org](http://www.dokuwiki.org/ "http://www.dokuwiki.org")
 and 8 were unavailable at the time of survey. 16 of this years new plugins have their information externally (most of them [CosmoCode's](http://www.cosmocode.de/en/index "http://www.cosmocode.de/en/index")
 ICKE-wiki plugins). Here is a list of the broken links:

*   [autosearch](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:autosearch "plugin:autosearch")
     (2:nd year), [bibtex](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:bibtex "plugin:bibtex")
    , [chord](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:chord "plugin:chord")
    , [countdowntimer](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:countdowntimer "plugin:countdowntimer")
    , [highlight](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:highlight "plugin:highlight")
     (2:nd year), [interpro](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:interpro "plugin:interpro")
     (2:nd year), [markdown](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:markdown "plugin:markdown")
     (2:nd year), [piwik](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:piwik "plugin:piwik")
    

#### Bz2 compression

By not using Bz2 compression you make it easier for your users. In many PHP releases BZ2 extensions are not included and they require a recompile of PHP, not feasible for a lot of users. Examples are [conform](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:conform "plugin:conform")
, [google\_maps](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:google_maps "plugin:google_maps")
 and [lightboxv2](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:lightboxv2 "plugin:lightboxv2")
.

#### plugin.info.txt

Plugins are no longer required to implement a getInfo() function used by the [plugin manager](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:plugin "plugin:plugin")
. Since DokuWiki 2009-12-25 release they may instead add an `plugin.info.txt` file which added better protection against download packages with faulty folder names. Now 36% of the plugin with download packages includes this file.

| Survey | Plugins |
| --- | --- |
| 2010 | 94  |
| 2011 | 257 |

Edit

#### Bad folder structure

More than one plugin package are both missing a \*.info.txt file and have a wrong folder structure. This will make the plugin manager fail with the message “Plugin package (0 plugins: ) successfully installed.”. Examples are [jira](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:jira "plugin:jira")
, [multinamespace](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:multinamespace "plugin:multinamespace")
 and [codehighlight](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:codehighlight "plugin:codehighlight")
.

Edit

Without plugin package
----------------------

Another way of installing plugins are by cut-n-paste code snippets from the plugin homepage following the [plugin\_installation\_instructions](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin_installation_instructions "plugin_installation_instructions")
. There are 89 plugins (11%) that only offer manual installation. 157 plugins has at least one php <code> section besides a download link. New plugins since last survey without download package:

*   [anchor](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:anchor "plugin:anchor")
    , [codepad](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:codepad "plugin:codepad")
    , [dokuwikitweet](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:dokuwikitweet "plugin:dokuwikitweet")
    , [hiddenheader](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:hiddenheader "plugin:hiddenheader")
    , [masciimath](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:masciimath "plugin:masciimath")
    , [mredirect](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:mredirect "plugin:mredirect")
    , [nodisp](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:nodisp "plugin:nodisp")
    , [previous](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:previous "plugin:previous")
    , [spatialhelper](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:spatialhelper "plugin:spatialhelper")
    , [timeline2](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:timeline2 "plugin:timeline2")
    

1 popular[1)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:plugin_survey:deployment#fn__1)
 plugin are missing a download package.

*   [color](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:color "plugin:color")
    

Continue to ⇒ [compatibility](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:plugin_survey:compatibility "devel:plugin_survey:compatibility")

Edit

[1)](https://www.dokuwiki.org/devel:plugin_survey:deployment#fnt__1)

more than 200 installations

Mark"2017-12-03 15:12 latest reasonable revision restored (2017-11-12 19:13)2017-12-02 18:20 2017-12-01 00:28 2017-11-12 19:13 Aleksandr old revision restored (2016-05-17 06:04)2017-11-12 08:01 2016-05-17 06:04 test2016-05-17 06:04 aaa2016-03-18 04:26 \[Configuration Manager Plugin\] 2016-03-18 04:26 \[Configuration Manager Plugin\] 2016-03-17 12:56 \[Description\] 2016-03-17 12:56 \[Description\] 2016-03-14 02:10 ach old revision restored (2016-01-26 03:16)2016-03-06 12:43 2016-01-26 03:16 2016-01-26 03:15 2015-11-11 06:53 old revision restored (2015-09-05 14:51)2015-11-10 21:33 \[How is your config saved\] 2015-09-05 14:51 ach \[Path Strings\] please submit a bug report2015-08-24 17:18 2015-05-09 23:20 ach old revision restored (2015-03-21 22:57)2015-05-06 04:44 2015-03-21 22:57 old revision restored (2014-09-29 20:37)2015-03-21 22:57 just playing, wont save anything2014-09-29 20:37 \[Triangle and Exclamation Mark\] - TheFax2014-09-23 12:19 Add question about meaning of triangles and exclamation marks in config fields.2014-08-02 13:27 ach added last update date2014-07-24 14:58 \[Description\] 2014-07-24 14:58 \[Description\] 2014-07-05 13:10 \[Configuration Manager Plugin\] 2014-07-05 13:09 \[Configuration Manager Plugin\] 2014-04-23 11:40 old revision restored (2014/03/28 19:12)2014-04-23 11:08 2014-03-28 19:12 old revision restored (2014/03/04 08:02)2014-03-28 18:43 \[Configuration Manager Plugin\] 2014-03-28 18:42 \[Description\] 2014-03-04 08:02 old revision restored (2014/02/06 18:06)2014-03-04 07:19 \[File Permissions\] 2014-03-04 07:18 \[Protecting Settings\] 2014-03-04 07:18 \[File Permissions\] 2014-02-10 15:57 \[Usage\] 2014-02-06 18:06 old revision restored (2014/01/13 14:01)2014-02-06 17:30 \[Description\] 2014-02-06 17:30 \[Description\] Go |     |
| [plugin:config \[2016-05-17 06:04\]](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config?rev=1463457846)<br> – aaa 118.70.221.66 |     | [plugin:config \[2024-09-28 23:18\]](https://www.dokuwiki.org/plugin:config)<br> (current) – old revision restored (2024-09-19 07:08) michaelsy |     |
| Line 1: |     | Line 1: |     |
| \-  | **aaaaaaaaa** | +   | **\====== Configuration Manager Plugin ======** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\---- plugin ----** |
|     |     | +   | **description: Manage your wiki's configuration settings (bundled with DokuWiki)** |
|     |     | +   | **author     : Christopher Smith** |
|     |     | +   | **email      : chris@jalakai.co.uk** |
|     |     | +   | **type       : admin** |
|     |     | +   | **lastupdate : 2014-03-18** |
|     |     | +   | **compatible : (bundled)** |
|     |     | +   | **screenshot\_img: :plugin:configmanager.png** |
|     |     | +   | **depends    :** |
|     |     | +   | **conflicts  :** |
|     |     | +   | **similar    :** |
|     |     | +   | **tags       : configuration, settings, options, !bundled** |
|     |     | +   | **\----** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\===== Description =====** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **{{ :plugin:configmanager.png?350\|The Configuration Manager - Field colors: blue = default, white = local change, light red = protected setting}}** |
|     |     | +   | **The Config Manager allows wiki \[\[config:superuser\|administrators\]\] to easily alter the wiki \[\[:config\|configuration\]\] settings online from the comfort of their favorite web browser. This plugin manages basic DokuWiki configurations as well as \[\[devel:configuration\|other settings\]\] for installed \[\[:plugins\]\] and currently used \[\[:template\]\].** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\===== Usage =====** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **The Config Manager is accessible from the admin screen (Login as superuser, click "Admin" and choose "{{https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dokuwiki/dokuwiki/master/lib/plugins/config/admin.svg?14}} Configuration Settings").** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **Settings are shown with different backgrounds to highlight their current status.** |
|     |     | +   | **\* A blue background is used to show default values (''conf/dokuwiki.php''), eg. values that have not been modified by the user.** |
|     |     | +   | **\* A white background indicates local changes (''conf/local.php'').** |
|     |     | +   | **\* A light red background shows protected settings (''conf/local.protected.php'') which can not be modified.** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **Modify settings to your needs and save it by using the ''Save'' button at bottom of the page, by pressing 'Enter' in a textbox or by using the \[\[:accesskey\]\] of your browser: ''<accesskey> + S''** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\==== How is your config saved ====** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **On saving changed settings this plugin will copy the current local settings file (''conf/local.php'') to ''conf/local.php.bak'' and save the updated settings to ''conf/local.php''.  It will never make any changes to the default settings stored in ''conf/dokuwiki.php''.  However, any settings found in ''conf/local.php'' will override the default settings as explained in the \[\[:config\|configuration options page\]\].** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **The plugin adds the following lines to the top of ''conf/local.php'' when it updates it:** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **<file php conf/local.php>** |
|     |     | +   | **/\*** |
|     |     | +   | **\* DokuWiki's Main Configuration File - Local Settings** |
|     |     | +   | **\* Auto-generated by config plugin** |
|     |     | +   | **\* Run for user: <username>** |
|     |     | +   | **\* Date: <current date/time, rfc 2822 format (day, dd MMM YYYY hh:mm:ss TZ)>** |
|     |     | +   | **\*/** |
|     |     | +   | **</file>** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\==== Protecting Settings ====** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **You can protect certain settings by placing them in ''conf/local.protected.php'' (create the file if it doesn't exist).** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **By default DokuWiki loads its configuration files in the following order:** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **- ''conf/dokuwiki.php''** |
|     |     | +   | **- ''conf/local.php''** |
|     |     | +   | **- ''conf/local.protected.php''** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **This way, it is ensured that any values previously set from ''conf/dokuwiki.php'' and ''conf/local.php'' will be overridden by protected values from ''conf/local.protected.php''. Any settings found in ''conf/local.protected.php'' will be displayed by the plugin surrounded in light-red to indicate their protected status. Editing of protected values is disabled.** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **The loading order of configuration files is controlled by the global ''\[\[devel:preload\|$config\_cascade\]\]'' variable.** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\=== Example ===** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **<code php conf/local.protected.php>** |
|     |     | +   | **<?php** |
|     |     | +   | **/\*\*** |
|     |     | +   | **\* Protected settings** |
|     |     | +   | **\* Do override DokuWiki default settings and local settings from Config Manager** |
|     |     | +   | **\*/** |
|     |     | +   | **$conf\['useacl'\] = 1;** |
|     |     | +   | **</code>** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\==== File Permissions ====** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **To be able to save the configuration data, the file permissions of ''conf/local.php'' needs to be writable by the webserver, as well as the configuration directory itself. Refer to \[\[install:permissions\]\] on details how set file permissions on various systems.** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **When the plugin detects that the config file can not be written, it will show a message box at the top of the page that says** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\> "The settings file can not be updated, if this is unintentional, ensure the local settings file name and permissions are correct."** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **When this happens, the save button won't be shown.** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **\==== Triangle, Exclamation and Padlock Mark ====** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **Some fields in the configuration page show:** |
|     |     | +   | **\* A yellow warning sign ({{:config:warning.png?nolink\|}}) , or** |
|     |     | +   | **\* An exclamation mark in a red circle ({{:config:danger.png?nolink\|}}), or** |
|     |     | +   | **\* The drawing of a padlock ({{:config:security.png?nolink\|}})** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **These are the meanings of these three symbols:\\\\** |
|     |     | +   | **{{:config:warning.png?nolink\|}} \*\*Yellow Mark\*\* ⇒ changing this option may result in undesirable behaviors.\\\\** |
|     |     | +   | **{{:config:danger.png?nolink\|}} \*\*Red circle\*\* ⇒ changing this option could make your wiki and the configuration menu inaccessible.\\\\** |
|     |     | +   | **{{:config:security.png?nolink\|}} \*\*Padlock\*\* ⇒ changing this option could present a security risk.\\\\** |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | **Please, keep attention when you change these fields.** |

# template:wikiweko [DokuWiki]

template:wikiweko

Media Manager
=============

Namespaces
----------

Choose namespace

*   ![−](https://www.dokuwiki.org/lib/images/minus.gif)

| it:install:upgrade \[2009-03-09 12:05\] – 194.98.147.35 |     | [it:install:upgrade \[2014-02-27 17:08\]](https://www.dokuwiki.org/it:install:upgrade)<br> (versione attuale) – Klap-in |     |
| Linea 1: |     | Linea 1: |     |
|     |     | +   | \====== Aggiornamento ====== |
|     |     |     |     |
|     |     | +   | Prima di aggiornare dovresti sempre leggere il \[\[http://www.dokuwiki.org/changes\|changelog\]\] per vedere se devi stare attento a qualcosa che è cambiato durante l'aggiornamento. |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | Per determinare la versione che stai utilizzando dai un'occhiata al codice HTML sorgente della pagina generata da DokuWiki - dovrebbe esserci qualcosa come ''<meta name="generator" content="DokuWiki 2005-02-06" />''. |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | Il metodo più semplice per aggiornare è quello di seguire questi passi: |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | - \*\*Fai un backup completo del tuo wiki\*\* (meglio essere al sicuro prima che dispiaciuti dopo) |
|     |     | +   | \* se hai modificato il file .htaccess originale fornito dall'archivio di DokuWiki (ad esempio per \[\[http://www.dokuwiki.org/rewrite\|rewrite\]\]) fai particolare attenzione a salvare una copia |
|     |     | +   | \* <code> cp -Ra /percorso/del/wiki/\* /percorso/del/wikibackup </code> |
|     |     | +   | - \[\[http://download.dokuwiki.org/\|Scarica\]\] e \[\[http://www.dokuwiki.org/install:unpacking\|scompatta\]\] la nuova versione; verifica il \[\[http://www.dokuwiki.org/changes\|Changelog\]\] |
|     |     | +   | \* <code> tar -xzvf dokuwiki-xxxx-xx-xx.tgz</code> |
|     |     | +   | - Copia/Carica tutti i file nella vecchia installazione di DokuWiki sovrascrivendo tutti i file esistenti |
|     |     | +   | \* <code> 'cp' -rf dokuwiki-xxxx-xx-xx/\* /percorso/del/wiki/ |
|     |     | +   | </code> |
|     |     | +   | \* Il comando "cp" scritto tra apici assicura che il comando funzioni anche quando esista un alias a cp -i |
|     |     | +   | \* Verifica se tutti i file sono "nuovi" , altrimenti prova: |
|     |     | +   | \* <code> |
|     |     | +   | unalias cp |
|     |     | +   | cp -rf dokuwiki-xxxx-xx-xx/\* /percorso/del/wiki/ |
|     |     | +   | </code> |
|     |     | +   | - Rimuovi i vecchi file che non sono più usati (vedi sotto per un elenco dei file) |
|     |     | +   | - Sistema se necessario i \[\[install:permissions \| permessi\]\]; incluse possibilmente le nuove directory all'interno di ''data/'' come ''index/'' oppure ''tmp/'' |
|     |     | +   | - Verifica il file .htaccess per le modifiche necessarie (vedi passo 1 all'inizio: Fai un backup completo...) |
|     |     | +   | - Aggiorna i plugins |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | I passi elencati sopra sono sicuri quando si aderisce all'avviso di cambiare soltanto le versioni locali dei tuoi file di configurazione (come ''conf/local.php'' invece di ''conf/dokuwiki.php''). DokuWiki non sovrascriverà quei file locali. Se hai sempre usato la funzione \[\[plugin:config\|Gestione Plugin\]\] sei al sicuro visto che questa salva sempre il file in local.php. I dati utente e le informazioni \[\[:ACL\]\] non devono mai essere sovrascritte dal momento che DokuWiki contiene solo pochi esempi (con estensione ''.dist''). |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | \===== File da rimuovere ===== |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | Qui trovi un elenco dei file che sono stati rimossi nelle versioni precedenti. Dovresti verificare se sono ancora presenti nella tua installazione. Se lo sono, allora devi cancellarli. |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | <code> |

|     |     | +   | </code> |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | Coloro che utilizzano un accesso tramite console per connettersi al server possono copiare ed incollare il testo in un file presente nel sistema, successivamente eseguire i comandi per verificare e rimuovere quei files. Soltanto i file presenti vengono cancellati. Ho usato il nome del file  /tmp/removeold.txt per salvare un elenco dei file copiati da qui. |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | <code> |
|     |     | +   | for f in \`cat /tmp/removeold.txt\` |
|     |     | +   | do  |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | if \[ -f $f \] ; then |
|     |     | +   | ls -l $f |
|     |     | +   | rm  $f |
|     |     | +   | fi  |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | done |
|     |     | +   | </code> |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | Alternativamente, utilizzare questa riga di comando. Se sei paranoico, sostituisci il comando "rm -rf" con "ls -la" per vedere quali file saranno cancellati. Puoi lasciare i commenti e le righe vuote, ma esse produranno errori e avvisi. |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | <code> |
|     |     | +   | cat /tmp/removeold.txt \| xargs -n 1 rm -rf |
|     |     | +   | </code> |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | \===== Risoluzione problemi ===== |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | Se riscontri alcune anomalie nel comportamento di \[\[..:DokuWiki\]\] dopo l'aggiornamento, dovresti cancellare i file della cache presenti in ''data/cache/''. Devi essere sicuro che il tuo browser non abbia vecchi fogli di stile e script JavaScript nella cache semplicemente ricaricando la pagina (Shift-F5 oppure Ctrl-Shift-R nella maggior parte dei browser). |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | Pagine relative che si potrebbero applicare: |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | \* \[\[config:updatecheck\]\] -- Se le notifiche di aggiornamento persistono |
|     |     | +   | \* \[\[faq:toolbar\]\] -- Problemi con i pulsanti e con JavaScript |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | \===== Metodi alternativi ===== |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | Qui vengono descritti alcuni diversi metodi di Aggiornamento forniti dagli utenti. Alcuni di essi potrebbero essere non aggiornati. |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | \* \[\[http://www.dokuwiki.org/install:diffupgrade\|Aggiornamento mediante creazione diffs\]\] |
|     |     | +   | \* \[\[http://apscatalog.com/1/splitbrain.org/dokuwiki/\|Aggiornamento mediante APS\]\] - qualcuno lo ha mai provato? |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | \===== Riconoscimenti ===== |
|     |     | +   |     |
|     |     | +   | Pagina creata e aggiornata da \*\*Diego Pierotto\*\* |
